i: Note: Under Taliban governance (since August 2021), formal institutional channels are severely constrained. International NGOs operating in Afghanistan include WFP (World Food Programme), FAO (Food and Agriculture Organization), and ICRC (International Committee of the Red Cross). Local organizations like the Afghanistan Research and Evaluation Unit (AREU) continue limited research operations. UNAMA (United Nations Assistance Mission in Afghanistan) monitors human rights and governance.

Afghanistan's formal corporate sector is largely non-functional under current conditions. International engagement occurs through multilateral development organizations and humanitarian agencies. The Afghanistan Investment Authority was established to attract foreign investment but is currently non-operational.

FAO (Food and Agriculture Organization) — maintains agricultural programs in Afghanistan focused on food security and sustainable farming. UNODC (United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime) — publishes annual Afghanistan Opium Survey tracking cultivation area, yield, and farm-gate prices. World Bank Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) — the largest single source of development funding for Afghanistan, currently operating in limited capacity under санкции constraints.

Note: Afghanistan under Taliban rule has no elected legislature or representative democratic institutions. International engagement channels include: UN Security Council санкции regime (Resolution 2255), which allows humanitarian exemptions. The Doha process for political dialogue. Afghan diaspora organizations in Europe, North America, and Australia. International development partners coordinate through the Geneva Conference on Afghanistan.

AL.s: кандидат в ЕС country with small open экономика ($27B ВВП). Oil production (1.04% rents) centered in Patos-Marinzë field. Services-dominant (48.7% ВВП) with significant hydropower potential (95%+ of electricity from hydro).

sectors.w: Albania's oil sector is small and concentrated in aging onshore fields. As EU accession negotiations require экологический acquis alignment, the пересекающийся интерес between oil producers and government revenue ослабевает — EU экологический standards make marginal fields unprofitable.
bp: EU accession экологический alignment eliminates subsidies for marginal oil production. Когда Albania must meet EU экологический standards, пересекающийся интерес в continued extraction from aging fields (many dating to communist era) disappears — cleanup costs exceed production revenue.

Реализовать EU-aligned экологический monitoring and выбросы disclosure. Albania's EITI (Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) membership provides a framework — extending to выбросы makes W visible.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

Инвестировать в возобновляемая энергия diversification — Albania has significant untapped solar and wind potential
Принять EITI enhanced reporting standards including экологический metrics

AKBN: Require экологический bonds for all new exploration licenses
ERE (Energy Regulatory Entity): Accelerate возобновляемая энергия permitting
Свяжитесь с вашим member of the Kuvendi (Albanian Parliament) потребовать экологический remediation of legacy oil sites
Support accelerated EU accession negotiations contingent on экологический acquis compliance
Advocate for inclusion of экологический cleanup costs in Albania's EITI reporting
Добиваться Energy Community Treaty enforcement on возобновляемая энергия targets
i: AKM (Agjencia Kombëtare e Mjedisit / National Environment Agency) — responsible for экологический monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. AKM conducts экологический impact assessments for energy projects. AKBN (Agjencia Kombëtare e Burimeve Natyrore / National Agency of Natural Resources) — regulates oil and gas exploration and production licenses. Law 60/2016 'On Whistleblowing and Whistleblower Protection' — Albania's информатор protection statute, adopted as part of EU accession reforms, providing protection against retaliation for reporting violations of law.

Albpetrol — Albania's государственная oil company, managing legacy fields from the communist era. Albpetrol's operations include some of Europe's most contaminated industrial sites. Bankers Petroleum (now Geo-Jade Petroleum, Chinese-owned) — the largest oil producer in Albania, operating the Patos-Marinzë field. EITI (Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — Albania has been an EITI member since 2013, publishing annual reports on oil and горнодобывающая промышленность revenues.

ERE (Enti Rregullator i Energjisë / Energy Regulatory Entity) — Albania's independent энергетический регулятор, responsible for licensing, tariff-setting, and market regulation in the electricity and natural gas sectors. Ministry of Infrastructure and Energy — oversees national energy policy including the National Energy Strategy 2030, which targets significant возобновляемая энергия expansion.

Kuvendi i Shqipërisë (Parliament of Albania) — unicameral legislature with 140 members elected by proportional representation. Citizens can contact their deputies through parlament.al. The Komisioni për Veprimtarinë Prodhuese (Committee on Production Activities) handles energy and экологический legislation. Energy Community Treaty — Albania is a member of the Energy Community, which extends EU energy and экологический acquis to Southeast European countries. Non-compliance can result in dispute settlement proceedings.

AM.s: Small landlocked экономика ($26B ВВП) with significant горнодобывающая промышленность sector (min=6.79% of ВВП, primarily copper-molybdenum at Kajaran and Sotk gold mine). Services-dominant (62% ВВП). Geopolitical constraints from Nagorno-Karabakh conflict and closed borders with Turkey and Azerbaijan.

sectors.w: Armenia's горнодобывающая промышленность sector generates significant water pollution (Debed and Voghji rivers) and tailings dam risks. Когда downstream water quality data is published alongside mine production revenue, W становится вычислимым from bilateral transactions.
bp: Mandate экологический bonds and rehabilitation deposits that fully internalize mine closure costs. Когда горнодобывающая промышленность companies must pre-fund экологический remediation, пересекающийся интерес в extraction without cleanup ослабевает — marginal mines become unprofitable.

Mandatory real-time water quality monitoring downstream of all горнодобывающая промышленность operations, published openly. Armenia's EITI membership provides a disclosure framework — extending to экологический monitoring data makes W visible from production data.

Частично разрушаемо. Open-pit горнодобывающая промышленность inherently disturbs landscapes and generates acid mine drainage. However, modern tailings management and water treatment can reduce the magnitude of системная зависимость.
a: Report экологический violations at mine sites to the Environmental and Mining Inspection Body
Document water pollution downstream of tailings facilities — report to the Ministry of Environment
Use Armenia's информатор protection provisions under the Anti-Corruption Strategy for reporting

Commission independent water quality assessments for all operations

EMIB: Increase inspection frequency and enforce penalties for water pollution violations

Support strengthening of EITI reporting requirements to include экологический impact data
Advocate for EU-Armenia CEPA (Comprehensive and Enhanced Partnership Agreement) enforcement on экологический standards
Добиваться international arbitration standards that include экологический remediation in горнодобывающая промышленность investment disputes
i: Environmental and Mining Inspection Body (EMIB) — the Armenian government agency responsible for monitoring compliance with экологический regulations at горнодобывающая промышленность operations, conducting inspections, and imposing санкции. Ministry of Environment — oversees экологический policy, issues экологический impact assessment approvals, and sets water quality standards. Armenia's Anti-Corruption Council — established under the Prime Minister's office, provides channels for reporting corruption and misconduct in the горнодобывающая промышленность sector.

Zangezur Copper-Molybdenum Combine (ZCMC) — Armenia's largest горнодобывающая промышленность company, operating the Kajaran copper-molybdenum mine. Lydian International / Lydian Armenia — operator of the controversial Amulsar gold mine project. GeoProMining — Russian-owned company operating gold mines in Armenia. EITI — Armenia became an EITI candidate country in 2017, requiring disclosure of горнодобывающая промышленность revenues and contracts.

Ministry of Territorial Administration and Infrastructure — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy and licensing. Competition Protection Commission — monitors market concentration in the горнодобывающая промышленность sector. Armenian EITI Multi-Stakeholder Group — includes government, industry, and гражданское общество representatives overseeing extractive sector прозрачность.

Azgayin Zhoghov (National Assembly of Armenia) — unicameral parliament with 107 members. Citizens can contact their representatives through parliament.am. Armenia's 2018 revolution established stronger democratic institutions. EU-Armenia CEPA (Comprehensive and Enhanced Partnership Agreement) — signed in 2017, includes provisions on экологический protection and sustainable development that Armenia has committed to implement.

AO.s: Major African oil producer with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents ($29.6B). Sonangol (state oil company) dominates the экономика. Agriculture (22.1% ВВП) is largely subsistence. Post-civil war recovery continues with high inequality.

sectors.w: Angola's oil production is declining from mature deepwater fields. As extraction costs rise and global demand plateaus, the пересекающийся интерес between Sonangol and international partners (TotalEnergies, BP, ExxonMobil) ослабевает — declining reserves make diversification economically rational.
bp: Redirect Sonangol investment from deepwater exploration to возобновляемая энергия and agricultural modernization. Angola's solar potential is enormous (2,500+ kWh/m²/year). Когда renewable returns exceed marginal barrel returns from declining fields, the пересекающийся интерес breaks.

Реализовать EITI-standard revenue прозрачность extended to per-block экологический impact data. Angola rejoined EITI in 2020 — extending disclosure to выбросы and экологический costs makes W computable per production unit.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report экологический violations at oil facilities to MIREMPET (Ministry of Mineral Resources, Petroleum and Gas)
Document community health impacts near production facilities through local NGOs
Report financial irregularities in Sonangol operations — Angola's anti-corruption framework (Lei 3/20) provides limited protections
Sonangol: Разработать strategic diversification plan with binding возобновляемая энергия investment targets
International partners (TotalEnergies, BP): Реализовать Paris-aligned выбросы reduction plans for Angolan operations
Принять TCFD-aligned climate disclosure for all production sharing agreements
ANPG: Require экологический impact assessments with community consultation for all new production blocks
Ministry of Environment: Усилить enforcement of экологический regulations in the petroleum sector
Banco Nacional de Angola: Integrate climate risk into financial supervision of oil-dependent lending
Свяжитесь с вашим member of the Assembleia Nacional потребовать publication of per-block экологический impact data for all oil operations
Support EITI enhanced reporting with экологический metrics for Angola
Продвигать через the African Union for continental возобновляемая энергия investment targets
Добиваться Paris Agreement compliance monitoring through UNFCCC mechanisms
i: MIREMPET (Ministério dos Recursos Minerais, Petróleo e Gás) — Angola's ministry overseeing oil and gas operations, licensing, and regulation. ANPG (Agência Nacional de Petróleo, Gás e Biocombustíveis) — the national petroleum regulator, created in 2019 to replace Sonangol's dual role as regulator and operator. Lei 3/20 (Law on Public Probity) — Angola's anti-corruption law establishing asset declaration requirements and conflicts of interest rules for public officials. Whistleblower protection remains weak.

Sonangol E.P. — Angola's state oil company and the country's largest enterprise. Sonangol holds equity in all oil production sharing agreements and manages the state's petroleum interests. The company underwent restructuring in 2019, separating its regulatory functions to ANPG. TotalEnergies, BP, ExxonMobil, Eni — major international oil companies operating deepwater blocks offshore Angola.

ANPG (Agência Nacional de Petróleo, Gás e Biocombustíveis) — established in 2019 as the independent petroleum regulator, responsible for managing exploration and production contracts, monitoring compliance with license terms, and administering bidding rounds. Ministério do Ambiente — Angola's environment ministry, responsible for экологический policy, impact assessments, and pollution control.

Assembleia Nacional (National Assembly of Angola) — unicameral legislature with 220 members. Angola's electoral system uses party-list proportional representation. The most recent elections were held in 2022. Citizens can engage through assembleia.ao. Angola is a presidential republic with significant executive power. EITI — Angola was suspended from EITI in 2017 for insufficient progress but successfully reapplied and was readmitted in 2020, committing to enhanced прозрачность standards.

AR.s: G20 экономика ($638.4B ВВП) with massive Vaca Muerta shale formation (second-largest shale gas, fourth-largest shale oil reserves globally). Agricultural powerhouse (soy, beef) with 5.8% ag ВВП share but outsized экологический footprint. Chronic macroeconomic instability.

sectors.w: Argentina's Vaca Muerta development requires massive capital investment ($10B+/year) and government subsidies (Plan Gas). Removing subsidies breaks the пересекающийся интерес — without price guarantees, many Vaca Muerta wells are marginal at global market prices.
bp: Phase out Plan Gas subsidies and redirect capital to возобновляемая энергия. Argentina has world-class wind resources in Patagonia and solar in the northwest. Когда renewable electricity undercuts subsidized gas, the пересекающийся интерес between producers and government in continued fossil expansion breaks.

Mandatory per-well выбросы disclosure including methane venting and flaring. Argentina's Secretaría de Energía already collects production data — extending to выбросы makes W computable from production statistics.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Shale gas extraction and combustion release CO₂ and methane by physical process.
a: Report экологический violations at Vaca Muerta operations to the provincial природоохранный орган (Secretaría de Ambiente de Neuquén)
Document water contamination from fracking operations — report to AIC (Autoridad Interjurisdiccional de las Cuencas)
Report safety violations to the Secretaría de Trabajo
YPF: Разработать Paris-aligned transition plan with binding выбросы reduction targets for Vaca Muerta operations
Реализовать TCFD-aligned climate disclosure across all operations
Инвестировать в CCUS (carbon capture, utilization, and storage) pilot projects for gas processing facilities

SAyDS: Усилить federal экологический standards for unconventional hydrocarbon extraction
ENARGAS: Реформировать natural gas tariff structure to eliminate implicit fossil fuel subsidies

Усилить Argentina's NDC — current targets are considered insufficient by Climate Action Tracker
Leverage Mercosur-EU trade agreement экологический provisions to align energy transition commitments
Support South American возобновляемая энергия integration through regional grid interconnection
i: Secretaría de Ambiente de Neuquén — Neuquén province's природоохранный орган, responsible for экологический permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations in the Vaca Muerta formation. AIC (Autoridad Interjurisdiccional de las Cuencas de los ríos Limay, Neuquén y Negro) — the inter-jurisdictional water authority managing the river basins affected by Vaca Muerta operations. COFEMA (Consejo Federal de Medio Ambiente) — federal-provincial экологический coordination body. Argentina lacks comprehensive federal информатор protection legislation, though provincial laws vary.

YPF S.A. — Argentina's largest energy company (51% государственная), the dominant operator in Vaca Muerta. YPF's strategic decisions on Vaca Muerta development drive national energy policy. Pan American Energy, Vista Energy, TotalEnergies — other major operators in Vaca Muerta. Plan Gas.Ar — the Argentine government's gas production incentive program, guaranteeing minimum prices for domestic gas production to stimulate Vaca Muerta development.

Secretaría de Energía — Argentina's energy secretariat, responsible for energy policy, production monitoring, and regulatory oversight. SAyDS (Secretaría de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sustentable) — the federal environment secretariat, responsible for экологический policy and изменение климата. ENARGAS (Ente Nacional Regulador del Gas) — the national gas regulatory authority, overseeing gas transport, distribution, and tariff regulation.

Congreso de la Nación Argentina — bicameral legislature consisting of the Cámara de Diputados (257 members) and the Senado (72 members). Citizens can contact representatives through diputados.gov.ar and senado.gob.ar. The Comisión de Energía y Combustibles handles energy legislation. Argentina's NDC — Argentina submitted an updated NDC in 2021 targeting выбросы of no more than 349 MtCO₂e by 2030. Climate Action Tracker rates this as 'highly insufficient.'

AT.s: Wealthy EU экономика ($534.8B ВВП) with strong manufacturing (15.1% of ВВП). Low direct fossil fuel exposure but significant UPF and financial sector PST. Major transit hub for Russian gas (Baumgarten hub). High healthcare expenditure (11.83% ВВП) suggests diet-related disease burden.

sectors.w: Austria's healthcare system (ASVG social insurance) tracks diet-related disease costs with high granularity. Когда per-product-category healthcare costs are published alongside retail revenue, W становится вычислимым from bilateral UPF transactions.
bp: Реализовать front-of-pack health-impact labelling through EU Farm to Fork Strategy. Когда consumers see welfare costs at point of sale, the пересекающийся интерес between UPF manufacturers and retailers in high-margin processed products ослабевает.

Mandate publication of diet-attributable healthcare costs per product category using ASVG social insurance data. Austria's comprehensive health insurance system generates the data needed to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix in ways that affect metabolic response. Реформироватьulation mandates can reduce but not eliminate системная зависимость.

Document undisclosed processing methods — report to AGES (Austrian Agency for Health and Food Safety)

Support EU-wide adoption of front-of-pack nutritional labelling

Добиваться WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions through EU legislative process
i: Bundeswettbewerbsbehörde (BWB / Federal Competition Authority) — Austria's competition authority, investigating unfair commercial practices including misleading advertising. AGES (Agentur für Gesundheit und Ernährungssicherheit / Austrian Agency for Health and Food Safety) — the federal agency responsible for food safety, nutrition surveillance, and public health. AGES conducts food inspections and risk assessments. HinweisgeberInnenschutzgesetz (HSchG, 2023) — Austria's transposition of the EU Whistleblower Directive, providing protection for employees reporting violations of EU or national law.

EU Farm to Fork Strategy — includes proposals for mandatory front-of-pack nutrition labelling across the EU. Austrian food companies that move early gain competitive advantage in the EU single market. EFSA (European Food Safety Authority) — provides scientific opinions that shape EU food regulation applicable in Austria.

BMSGPK (Bundesministerium für Soziales, Gesundheit, Pflege und Konsumentenschutz / Federal Ministry of Social Affairs, Health, Care and Consumer Protection) — oversees food safety policy, nutrition guidelines, and consumer protection. Hauptverband der österreichischen Sozialversicherungsträger (now Dachverband) — the umbrella organization of Austrian social insurance institutions, managing healthcare data for the entire insured population.

Österreichisches Parlament — Austria's bicameral parliament consisting of the Nationalrat (183 members) and the Bundesrat (61 members). Citizens can contact representatives through parlament.gv.at. The Gesundheitsausschuss (Health Committee) handles health and food policy legislation.

AZ.s: Oil-dependent экономика with 29.57% combined oil and gas rents ($22B). SOCAR (State Oil Company) dominates. Hosted COP29 (2024). Authoritarian governance with limited гражданское общество space. Caspian Sea oil and gas fields (ACG, Shah Deniz) are mature.

sectors.w: Azerbaijan's oil production is declining from mature Caspian fields (ACG peaked in 2010). As production costs rise and reserves deplete, the пересекающийся интерес between SOCAR and international partners (BP) ослабевает — diversification becomes economically necessary.
bp: Accelerate post-oil diversification using SOFAZ (State Oil Fund) reserves. Azerbaijan's $50B+ sovereign wealth fund can finance возобновляемая энергия and non-oil economic development. Когда SOFAZ investment returns from renewables exceed declining oil returns, the пересекающийся интерес breaks.
Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for all Caspian operations. BP already publishes выбросы data for ACG — extending to all SOCAR operations makes W computable across the sector.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report экологический violations at oil facilities to the Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources
Document выбросы underreporting through internal SOCAR channels
Report экологический concerns to international partners (BP) through their compliance systems

BP Azerbaijan: Extend ACG выбросы прозрачность standards to all partner operations
SOFAZ: Принять ESG investment criteria excluding new fossil fuel development
Ministry of Ecology: Усилить экологический standards for offshore Caspian operations
EITI Azerbaijan: Expand reporting to include экологический impact data per production block

Leverage Azerbaijan's COP29 presidency legacy to strengthen national climate commitments

Support EITI enhanced reporting with экологический metrics
Добиваться European Energy Charter Treaty enforcement on экологический standards in transit countries
i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — Azerbaijan's природоохранный орган, responsible for экологический monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. The Ministry oversees экологический impact assessments for energy projects. SOCAR (State Oil Company of the Azerbaijan Republic) — the national oil company controlling all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Azerbaijan has no comprehensive информатор protection law. Civil society space is severely constrained; independent media and NGOs face significant operational barriers.

SOCAR — Azerbaijan's state oil company, operating the country's refining, petrochemical, and upstream assets. SOCAR also has international operations in Turkey, Georgia, and Europe. BP — the largest international operator in Azerbaijan, managing the Azeri-Chirag-Deepwater Gunashli (ACG) oilfield and Shah Deniz gas field through Production Sharing Agreements. SOFAZ (State Oil Fund of the Republic of Azerbaijan) — the sovereign wealth fund managing Azerbaijan's petroleum revenues, with assets exceeding $50B.

Azerbaijan EITI — Azerbaijan was an early EITI member (2003) and publishes annual reports on extractive industry revenues. The EITI process provides one of the few independent прозрачность mechanisms in the sector. Tariff (Price) Council — sets regulated energy prices in Azerbaijan. Tehran Convention — the Framework Convention for the Protection of the Marine Environment of the Caspian Sea, which governs экологический standards for offshore operations.

Milli Majlis (National Assembly of Azerbaijan) — unicameral parliament with 125 members. Note: Azerbaijan is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House; elections are not considered free and fair by international observers. Civic engagement channels are limited. International pressure operates primarily through multilateral forums including the Council of Europe (Azerbaijan is a member), OSCE, and the EITI Board. The EU-Azerbaijan Partnership and Cooperation Agreement provides a framework for dialogue on energy and экологический issues.

BA.s: Post-conflict экономика ($29.6B ВВП) with complex governance (two entities: Federation and Republika Srpska). Coal-dependent energy sector and manufacturing (12.7% ВВП). кандидат в ЕС country. Significant coal горнодобывающая промышленность and thermal power generation.

sectors.w: Bosnia's coal sector is heavily subsidized through below-market electricity pricing and state employment guarantees. EU accession requires alignment with the EU ETS — when carbon pricing applies, the пересекающийся интерес between coal producers and the state employment system breaks.
bp: EU accession alignment with EU ETS carbon pricing. Когда Bosnian coal power must pay the carbon price (~€90/ton), coal-fired electricity becomes uncompetitive with imported renewables. The пересекающийся интерес between mine operators and state employment programs breaks.

Mandatory выбросы monitoring and disclosure per power plant. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU-aligned экологический reporting — implementing this makes W computable from electricity generation data.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, and particulate matter by physical process.
a: Report экологический violations at coal mines and power plants to entity-level экологический inspectorates
Document health impacts in communities near coal power plants — report to public health institutes
Report corruption in coal procurement to the Agency for Prevention of Corruption and Coordination of the Fight Against Corruption

Инвестировать в возобновляемая энергия capacity to replace aging coal plants
Реализовать выбросы monitoring per facility ahead of EU ETS alignment

Support EU accession negotiations contingent on energy transition commitments

Добиваться Energy Community Treaty enforcement on air quality standards
i: Environmental inspection is split between the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina and Republika Srpska, each maintaining separate экологический agencies. Federation: Federalni inspektorat — экологический inspectorate. Republika Srpska: Republička uprava za inspekcijske poslove — inspection administration. Agency for Prevention of Corruption and Coordination of the Fight Against Corruption (APIK) — state-level anti-corruption body. Bosnia lacks comprehensive информатор protection legislation, though draft laws have been discussed as part of EU accession reforms.

EPBiH (Elektroprivreda Bosne i Hercegovine) — the Federation's state electricity company, operating coal-fired power plants and hydropower. ERS (Elektroprivreda Republike Srpske) — Republika Srpska's state electricity company. Both companies operate aging coal infrastructure (many plants dating to Yugoslav era) and are major employers in горнодобывающая промышленность communities.

DERK (Državna regulatorna komisija za električnu energiju / State Electricity Regulatory Commission) — the state-level electricity regulator. FERK and RERS are entity-level regulators. Energy Community Treaty — Bosnia is a contracting party, committed to implementing EU energy and экологический acquis including Large Combustion Plants Directive and Industrial Emissions Directive.

Parlamentarna skupština Bosne i Hercegovine (Parliamentary Assembly) — bicameral legislature consisting of the Predstavnički dom (House of Representatives, 42 members) and the Dom naroda (House of Peoples, 15 members). Bosnia's complex governance structure (Dayton Agreement) divides power between state, entity, and cantonal levels. Citizens can contact representatives through parlament.ba.

BD.s: Large экономика ($450.1B ВВП) driven by garment manufacturing (21.9% mfg share of ВВП). High agricultural employment (11.2% ВВП). Extreme climate vulnerability — low-lying delta at severe flood and cyclone risk. One of the world's most densely populated countries.

sectors.w: Bangladesh's rice monoculture depletes groundwater (arsenic contamination) and reduces soil biodiversity. Satellite-based crop monitoring and water quality data from BWDB can make W computable from agricultural output and water extraction volumes.
bp: Реформировать agricultural subsidies from input-based (fertilizer, diesel) to outcome-based (soil health, water efficiency). Когда subsidies reward diversification rather than rice intensification, пересекающийся интерес в monoculture between farmers and input suppliers ослабевает.

Mandatory groundwater extraction monitoring and arsenic contamination mapping published at upazila level. BWDB already collects water data — extending to public disclosure linked to agricultural output makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Intensive rice cultivation in deltaic conditions inherently alters hydrology and nutrient cycling. However, System of Rice Intensification (SRI) and crop diversification can reduce системная зависимость.

Document groundwater over-extraction or arsenic contamination — report to DPHE (Department of Public Health Engineering)

Support Bangladesh's Climate Vulnerable Forum leadership in advocating for agricultural adaptation finance
Advocate for inclusion of groundwater depletion costs in national ВВП accounting

i: DAE (Department of Agricultural Extension) — the primary government agency for agricultural technical support and extension services, operating at union, upazila, and district levels. DPHE (Department of Public Health Engineering) — responsible for water supply and sanitation, including monitoring arsenic contamination in groundwater (affecting ~35 million people). BFSA (Bangladesh Food Safety Authority) — established in 2015 to regulate food safety across the supply chain. Bangladesh lacks comprehensive информатор protection legislation.

BRRI (Bangladesh Rice Research Institute) — the national research institute developing improved rice varieties, including flood-tolerant (BRRI dhan52), salt-tolerant, and drought-resistant varieties. BARI (Bangladesh Agricultural Research Institute) — conducts research on non-rice crops including vegetables, pulses, and oilseeds. BADC (Bangladesh Agricultural Разработатьment Corporation) — the government agency responsible for seed production and distribution.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy, subsidies, and development programs. BWDB (Bangladesh Water Разработатьment Board) — responsible for flood control, drainage, and irrigation infrastructure. The BWDB manages the country's water resource data system. DoE (Department of Environment) — Bangladesh's экологический regulatory agency, responsible for экологический clearance of projects and monitoring pollution.

Jatiya Sangsad (National Parliament of Bangladesh) — unicameral legislature with 350 members (300 directly elected, 50 reserved for women). Citizens can contact representatives through parliament.gov.bd. The Standing Committee on Ministry of Agriculture handles agricultural policy. Bangladesh Climate Change Strategy and Action Plan (BCCSAP) — the national framework for climate adaptation and mitigation, including agricultural resilience.

BE.s: EU and NATO headquarters экономика ($671.4B ВВП). Services-dominant (71% ВВП). Major port (Antwerp — Europe's second-largest) handles significant fossil fuel and petrochemical throughput. High healthcare expenditure (10.8% ВВП). Federal state with three regions.

sectors.w: Belgium's comprehensive INAMI/RIZIV health insurance system tracks healthcare costs with high granularity. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Реализовать front-of-pack health labelling (Belgium adopted Nutri-Score voluntarily in 2019). Extending to mandatory application and adding health-cost information ослабевает пересекающийся интерес в high-margin UPF.
INAMI/RIZIV publication of anonymized diet-attributable healthcare cost data per product category. Belgium's universal health insurance generates comprehensive data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix affecting metabolic response. Реформироватьulation mandates reduce but do not eliminate системная зависимость.

Document food safety violations — report to AFSCA/FAVV (Federal Agency for the Safety of the Food Chain)
Use the Belgian информатор protection law (transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937) for protected reporting

i: AFSCA/FAVV (Agence fédérale pour la sécurité de la chaîne alimentaire / Federaal Agentschap voor de Veiligheid van de Voedselketen) — Belgium's federal food safety agency, responsible for food chain safety from farm to fork. Conducts inspections, sampling, and enforcement. SPF Économie (Service public fédéral Économie) — the federal economic affairs service handling consumer protection and fair commercial practices.

Fevia (Federation of the Belgian Food Industry) — the trade association representing over 700 food companies in Belgium. Fevia's sustainability commitments influence industry practices. Belgium hosts major food companies including Puratos, Vandemoortele, and Lotus Bakeries.

SPF Santé publique (Federal Public Service Health, Food Chain Safety and Environment) — the federal ministry overseeing public health policy, food safety, and environment. INAMI/RIZIV (Institut national d'assurance maladie-invalidité / Rijksinstituut voor ziekte- en invaliditeitsverzekering) — Belgium's national health insurance institute, managing the compulsory health insurance system and healthcare cost data.

Parlement fédéral / Federaal Parlement — Belgium's bicameral parliament consisting of the Chambre des représentants / Kamer van Volksvertegenwoordigers (150 members) and the Sénat / Senaat (60 members). Citizens can contact representatives through lachambre.be / dekamer.be. Belgium's federal structure means health policy is shared between federal and regional (community) governments.

BF.s: Low-income Sahelian экономика ($23.1B ВВП) with dominant gold горнодобывающая промышленность sector (min=15.45% ВВП). Agriculture employs 80%+ of population (20.9% ВВП). Military junta since 2022 coup. Severe security challenges (jihadist insurgency).

sectors.w: Burkina Faso's gold горнодобывающая промышленность generates cyanide contamination, mercury pollution (artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность), and community displacement. Когда экологический and health costs per mine are published alongside production revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Mandate экологический bonds and community benefit agreements for all industrial горнодобывающая промышленность licenses. Когда горнодобывающая промышленность companies must pre-fund экологический remediation and community compensation, пересекающийся интерес в extraction without accountability ослабевает.

Publish по каждому месторождению экологический impact data (water quality, air quality, land disturbance) alongside production revenue through EITI reporting. Burkina Faso's EITI membership provides the framework — extending to экологический data makes W visible.

Частично разрушаемо. Open-pit gold горнодобывающая промышленность inherently disturbs landscapes and generates toxic waste. However, improved tailings management and mercury-free artisanal methods can reduce системная зависимость.

Document community health impacts near горнодобывающая промышленность operations through local health clinics

i: BUNEE (Bureau National des Évaluations Environnementales) — Burkina Faso's national экологический assessment authority, responsible for экологический impact assessments of горнодобывающая промышленность projects. Ministère de l'Environnement, de l'Énergie, de l'Eau et de l'Assainissement — oversees экологический policy and regulation. Note: Under military rule since 2022, institutional capacity is constrained and гражданское общество space is restricted.

Major горнодобывающая промышленность companies operating in Burkina Faso include Endeavour Mining (Houndé, Wahgnion mines), IAMGOLD (Essakane mine), and Nordgold (Bissa-Bouly). These international companies are subject to home-country ESG reporting requirements and international горнодобывающая промышленность standards (ICMM, IFC Performance Standards).

Ministère des Mines et des Carrières — the ministry responsible for горнодобывающая промышленность policy, licensing, and regulation. BUMIGEB (Bureau des Mines et de la Géologie du Burkina) — the geological survey and горнодобывающая промышленность technical agency. EITI Burkina Faso — Burkina Faso has been an EITI member since 2009, publishing reports on горнодобывающая промышленность revenues. The 2015 Mining Code establishes экологический obligations for горнодобывающая промышленность companies.

Note: Burkina Faso is under military rule (Capitaine Ibrahim Traoré since 2022). The Assemblée Législative de Transition (Transitional Legislative Assembly) replaced the elected National Assembly. Democratic institutions are suspended. International engagement channels: ECOWAS (Economic Community of West African States — though Burkina Faso announced withdrawal in 2024), African Union, and international development partners. The African Mining Vision (2009) provides a continental framework for sustainable горнодобывающая промышленность governance.

BG.s: член ЕС экономика ($113.3B ВВП) with legacy coal dependence (Maritsa East complex is one of Europe's largest lignite basins). Services-dominant (63.8% ВВП). EU accession has driven institutional modernization but coal transition remains politically sensitive.

sectors.w: Bulgaria's coal sector is sustained by implicit subsidies (below-market electricity pricing, state employment). EU ETS carbon pricing makes lignite uncompetitive — when full carbon costs are internalized, the пересекающийся интерес between mine operators and state employment programs breaks.
bp: Full alignment with EU ETS free allowance phase-out. Когда Bulgarian lignite plants pay the EU carbon price without free allowances, coal-fired electricity becomes uncompetitive. The пересекающийся интерес breaks when renewable alternatives are cheaper.

Mandatory по каждому предприятию выбросы and health-impact disclosure. Bulgaria's lignite plants (Maritsa East I, II, III) are among Europe's worst air polluters. Publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable from electricity generation data.
Не разрушаемо. Lignite combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, NOx, and particulate matter by physical process.

i: RIOSV (Регионални инспекции по околната среда и водите / Regional Inspectorates of Environment and Water) — 16 regional экологический agencies conducting inspections and enforcement. EEA (Изпълнителна агенция по околна среда / Executive Environment Agency) — the national экологический monitoring agency collecting выбросы and air quality data. Bulgaria transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2023.

Maritsa East complex — comprises three lignite-fired power plants (Maritsa East I, II, III) and the associated Maritsa-Iztok mines. AES Bulgaria operates Maritsa East I; ContourGlobal operates Maritsa East III. The complex is the largest industrial employer in the Stara Zagora region. Mini Maritsa-Iztok — the государственная lignite горнодобывающая промышленность company supplying the Maritsa East plants.

KEVR (Комисия за енергийно и водно регулиране / Energy and Water Regulatory Commission) — Bulgaria's independent энергетический регулятор, setting electricity tariffs and licensing. Ministry of Energy — oversees energy policy including the National Energy and Climate Plan (NECP). Bulgaria's NECP has been criticized for insufficient coal phase-out ambition.

Narodno Sabranie (Народно събрание / National Assembly of Bulgaria) — unicameral parliament with 240 members. Citizens can contact representatives through parliament.bg. The Комисия по енергетика (Energy Committee) handles energy legislation. EU Just Transition Fund — Bulgaria is eligible for significant JTF funding to support coal transition in affected regions. Bulgaria's Territorial Just Transition Plans cover Stara Zagora, Kyustendil, and Pernik regions.

BH.s: Small island petrostate ($47.1B ВВП) with 16.64% combined oil and gas rents. Bahrain's Abu Safa offshore field (shared with Saudi Arabia) provides the majority of oil revenue. Diversifying into financial services (Bahrain Financial Harbour) and aluminum (Alba smelter).

sectors.w: Bahrain's oil reserves are the smallest among GCC states (declining production from mature fields). The economic case for diversification is strongest here — when post-oil planning makes renewable investment more attractive than marginal barrel extraction, the пересекающийся интерес breaks.
bp: Accelerate Economic Vision 2030 diversification away from oil dependence. Bahrain's small size and advanced financial sector make it the most transition-ready GCC экономика. Когда financial services and technology revenue exceeds oil revenue, пересекающийся интерес в extraction breaks.

Publish по каждому месторождению экологический and выбросы data for all Bahrain Petroleum Company (BAPCO) operations. Making lifecycle выбросы visible per barrel makes W computable from production data.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: Supreme Council for Environment (SCE) — Bahrain's природоохранный орган, responsible for экологический policy, permitting, and enforcement. SCE oversees экологический impact assessments for industrial projects. BAPCO (Bahrain Petroleum Company) — the государственная oil company operating Bahrain's refinery and upstream assets. National Audit Office — conducts financial audits of government entities including BAPCO. Note: Bahrain has limited информатор protection; гражданское общество space is constrained.

BAPCO (Bahrain Petroleum Company) — operates the Sitra refinery (267,000 bpd after modernization) and manages upstream production. Mumtalakat — Bahrain's sovereign wealth fund, managing state assets including BAPCO and Alba (Aluminium Bahrain). Nogaholding — the investment arm of Bahrain's National Oil and Gas Authority, overseeing the country's energy sector investments.

NOGA (National Oil and Gas Authority) — the government body responsible for oil and gas policy, licensing, and upstream regulation. CBB (Central Bank of Bahrain) — the financial sector regulator, which has begun integrating ESG considerations into banking supervision. Bahrain Economic Разработатьment Board — coordinates the Economic Vision 2030 diversification strategy.

Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab) — the elected lower house of Bahrain's parliament (40 members) and the Shura Council (Majlis al-Shura, 40 appointed members). Note: Bahrain is a конституционная монархия with significant royal authority. Political opposition is restricted. The Council of Representatives has limited legislative power. International engagement on climate issues operates through GCC coordination and UNFCCC processes.

BJ.s: Small West African экономика ($21.5B ВВП) with dominant agriculture sector (24.2% ВВП, primarily cotton). Services growing (48.9% ВВП). Cotton is the main export crop — Benin is Africa's largest cotton producer. Climate vulnerability through Sahel desertification and coastal erosion.

sectors.w: Benin's cotton monoculture degrades soil fertility and increases pesticide exposure. Когда soil health data and pesticide-related healthcare costs are published alongside cotton production revenue, W становится вычислимым from agricultural output data.
bp: Реформировать cotton subsidies to reward soil health and crop diversification. Когда input subsidies (seeds, fertilizer, pesticides) are redirected from cotton intensification to mixed farming systems, the пересекающийся интерес between cotton traders and input suppliers ослабевает.

Mandatory publication of soil health metrics (organic matter, nutrient balance) and pesticide-related health costs per cotton-producing commune. Making экологический and health costs visible makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Cotton monoculture inherently depletes soil nutrients and requires pesticide application. However, integrated pest management and organic cotton production can reduce системная зависимость — Benin has a growing organic cotton sector.

i: DPQC (Direction de la Promotion de la Qualité et du Conditionnement des Produits Agricoles) — the government directorate responsible for agricultural product quality and standards. ABE (Agence Béninoise pour l'Environnement) — Benin's экологический agency, responsible for экологический impact assessment and monitoring. FONAC (Front des Organisations Nationales contre la Corruption) — a national anti-corruption coalition of гражданское общество organizations.

AIC (Association Interprofessionnelle du Coton) — the inter-professional cotton association coordinating relations between producers, ginners, and input suppliers. SODECO (Société de Développement du Coton) — the main cotton ginning company. The cotton sector was partially liberalized but remains state-coordinated through the AIC framework.

MAEP (Ministère de l'Agriculture, de l'Élevage et de la Pêche) — Benin's agriculture ministry, responsible for agricultural policy and cotton sector coordination. ABE (Agence Béninoise pour l'Environnement) — conducts экологический monitoring and impact assessments. INSAE (Institut National de la Statistique et de l'Analyse Économique) — Benin's national statistics institute.

Assemblée Nationale du Bénin — unicameral parliament with 109 members. Citizens can contact their deputies through the official Assembly website. Note: Benin's democratic space has narrowed under recent constitutional reforms, though elections continue. Cotton-4 group — Benin, Burkina Faso, Chad, and Mali coordinate on cotton trade policy at the WTO, advocating against subsidies in developed countries that depress global cotton prices.

BN.s: Small wealthy petrostate ($15.3B ВВП) with 24.23% combined oil and gas rents. Brunei Shell Petroleum (BSP, 50/50 JV with Shell) dominates the экономика. Absolute monarchy. Wawasan Brunei 2035 diversification strategy underway but oil/gas remain 60%+ of government revenue.

sectors.w: Brunei's oil production is in long-term decline (from 220,000 bpd peak to ~100,000 bpd). As reserves deplete, the пересекающийся интерес between BSP and the government in continued extraction ослабевает — Wawasan 2035 diversification becomes economically necessary.
bp: Accelerate Wawasan 2035 economic diversification using Brunei Investment Agency (BIA) sovereign wealth. Когда non-oil sectors generate more government revenue than declining oil production, пересекающийся интерес в extraction breaks.
Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for all BSP and Total operations. Shell's global ESG reporting standards can be extended to Brunei operations to make W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: BSP (Brunei Shell Petroleum) — a 50/50 joint venture between the government of Brunei and Shell, the country's largest oil and gas producer. BSP operates onshore and offshore fields. Department of Environment, Parks and Recreation — under the Ministry of Разработатьment, responsible for экологический policy and regulation. Note: Brunei is an absolute monarchy with no elected legislature. There is no информатор protection legislation. Reporting channels are primarily internal corporate mechanisms.

BSP (Brunei Shell Petroleum) — managed jointly by the Brunei government and Shell. BIA (Brunei Investment Agency) — the sovereign wealth fund managing Brunei's petroleum revenues (estimated $30-40B). Total E&P Borneo — operates deep water gas fields offshore Brunei. PetroleumBRUNEI — the national petroleum authority overseeing the sector.

PetroleumBRUNEI — the national petroleum authority responsible for policy, regulation, and management of Brunei's oil and gas resources. AMBD (Autoriti Monetari Brunei Darussalam) — Brunei's central bank and financial regulator. Department of Energy — under the Prime Minister's Office, coordinates energy policy and the Wawasan 2035 energy diversification strategy.

Note: Brunei is an absolute monarchy (Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah). There is no elected legislature — the Legislative Council (Majlis Mesyuarat Negara) is appointed and has advisory functions only. Civic engagement operates through petition to the Sultan and through ASEAN and international multilateral channels. ASEAN — Brunei is a founding member. ASEAN's Framework for Circular Economy and declaration on изменение климата provide regional engagement mechanisms.

BO.s: Resource-dependent экономика ($54.9B ВВП) with significant natural gas reserves (gas=1.85% rents) and горнодобывающая промышленность (min=5.91%, lithium in Salar de Uyuni — world's largest deposit). Сельское хозяйство 8.8% ВВП with soy expansion driving обезлесение. Gas production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Bolivia holds the world's largest lithium reserves in the Salar de Uyuni. Lithium extraction uses massive water volumes in arid regions. Когда water consumption and brine chemistry data are published alongside production revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Require community benefit agreements and water rights guarantees for all lithium extraction. Когда indigenous communities (who hold constitutional land rights under Bolivia's 2009 Constitution) can negotiate fair terms, пересекающийся интерес в extraction without consent ослабевает.

Mandatory publication of water extraction volumes, brine chemistry changes, and downstream ecosystem data per lithium operation. Making экологический costs visible makes W computable from production data.

Частично разрушаемо. Lithium brine extraction inherently alters aquifer chemistry and reduces water availability in arid ecosystems. However, direct lithium extraction (DLE) technology can significantly reduce water consumption compared to evaporation ponds.

i: AJAM (Autoridad Jurisdiccional Administrativa Minera) — the горнодобывающая промышленность administrative authority responsible for granting and overseeing горнодобывающая промышленность concessions. Defensoría del Pueblo — Bolivia's human rights ombudsman, responsible for investigating complaints about government actions affecting fundamental rights, including indigenous and экологический rights. Bolivia's 2009 Constitution (Article 30) — guarantees indigenous peoples' right to prior consultation on resource extraction in their territories.

YLB (Yacimientos de Litio Bolivianos) — Bolivia's state lithium company, managing lithium industrialization in the Salar de Uyuni. COMIBOL (Corporación Minera de Bolivia) — the state горнодобывающая промышленность corporation overseeing Bolivia's горнодобывающая промышленность sector. YPFB (Yacimientos Petrolíferos Fiscales Bolivianos) — the state hydrocarbons company.

Ministerio de Minería y Metalurgia — Bolivia's горнодобывающая промышленность ministry, responsible for горнодобывающая промышленность policy and regulation. MMAyA (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Agua) — the environment and water ministry, overseeing экологический policy and water resource management. SENARECOM (Servicio Nacional de Registro y Control de la Comercialización de Minerales y Metales) — the national service for mineral commerce registration and control.

Asamblea Legislativa Plurinacional (Plurinational Legislative Assembly) — Bolivia's bicameral parliament consisting of the Cámara de Diputados (130 members) and the Cámara de Senadores (36 members). Bolivia's 2009 Constitution establishes a 'plurinational' state recognizing indigenous rights and communitarian демократия. ILO Convention 169 — Bolivia has ratified ILO Convention 169 on Indigenous and Tribal Peoples, requiring free, prior, and informed consultation on resource extraction in indigenous territories.

BS.s: Small island экономика ($15.8B ВВП) dominated by tourism and financial services (77.2% services). Extreme climate vulnerability — low-lying islands face existential risk from sea level rise and intensifying hurricanes (Hurricane Dorian, 2019, caused $3.4B damage — 25% of ВВП).

sectors.w: The Bahamas' offshore financial center enables capital flows that may avoid tax obligations elsewhere. Когда beneficial ownership information and tax прозрачность data are published, the system welfare impact of offshore finance becomes computable.
bp: Реализовать full beneficial ownership прозрачность in line with FATF recommendations. Когда the competitive advantage of Bahamian financial secrecy is eliminated through прозрачность, the пересекающийся интерес between offshore service providers and tax-avoiding clients ослабевает.

Publish aggregate data on capital flows, tax rulings, and beneficial ownership through enhanced OECD Common Reporting Standard participation. Making tax revenue impacts visible to source jurisdictions makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Financial intermediation can relocate — but the Bahamas' geographic proximity to the US and established legal infrastructure create switching costs that give regulation leverage.

i: FIU (Financial Intelligence Unit of The Bahamas) — the agency responsible for receiving, analyzing, and disseminating suspicious transaction reports. The FIU works with law enforcement to combat money laundering and terrorist financing. Securities Commission of The Bahamas — regulates the investment funds industry and securities market. Central Bank of The Bahamas — the prudential regulator of banks and trust companies.

The Bahamas is home to approximately 200 licensed banks and trust companies. Major international banks maintain operations in Nassau. The Bahamas Финансовые услуги Board (BFSB) promotes the financial services sector and coordinates industry standards.

Central Bank of The Bahamas — the primary financial regulator and supervisor. The Compliance Commission — supervises non-bank financial service providers for anti-money laundering compliance. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — The Bahamas has been subject to FATF enhanced monitoring and has implemented reforms to address identified deficiencies in its AML/CFT framework.

Parliament of The Bahamas — bicameral legislature consisting of the House of Assembly (39 members) and the Senate (16 appointed members). Citizens can contact their MP through the official government portal. The Bahamas is a Westminster-style парламентская демократия. AOSIS (Alliance of Small Island States) — The Bahamas is an active member, advocating for climate action and sea level rise mitigation. CARICOM — provides regional coordination on financial regulation.

BW.s: Upper-middle-income экономика ($19.4B ВВП) with diamond горнодобывающая промышленность historically driving growth (Debswana JV with De Beers). Services-dominant (63.5% ВВП). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Diversification challenge as lab-grown diamonds threaten natural diamond demand.

sectors.w: Lab-grown diamonds are disrupting the natural diamond market (30%+ of gem market by volume). As synthetic alternatives become indistinguishable and cheaper, the пересекающийся интерес between Debswana and consumers in natural diamond premium ослабевает — Botswana must diversify.
bp: Accelerate economic diversification using Pula Fund sovereign wealth. Когда non-diamond revenue streams (tech, tourism, beef) exceed declining diamond revenues, пересекающийся интерес в continued diamond dependence breaks naturally.

Publish full lifecycle экологический data (water use, land disturbance, energy consumption) per carat for all горнодобывающая промышленность operations. Making экологический costs visible makes W computable from diamond production data.

Частично разрушаемо. Open-pit diamond горнодобывающая промышленность inherently disturbs landscapes. However, Botswana's mines are in relatively low-biodiversity Kalahari terrain, and rehabilitation programs can reduce long-term системная зависимость.

i: DEA (Department of Environmental Affairs) — under the Ministry of Environment and Tourism, responsible for экологический policy, impact assessment, and monitoring. Department of Mines — under the Ministry of Minerals and Energy, responsible for горнодобывающая промышленность safety regulation, licensing, and compliance monitoring. Office of the Ombudsman — investigates complaints against government agencies and public officials.

Debswana Diamond Company — a 50/50 joint venture between the Government of Botswana and De Beers Group, operating the Jwaneng and Orapa mines. Debswana is Botswana's largest private employer and the largest contributor to government revenue. De Beers Group (Anglo American subsidiary) — the global diamond company partnering with Botswana. The 2023 renegotiation of the Debswana agreement gave Botswana a greater share of rough diamond sales.

Ministry of Minerals and Energy — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy and the regulatory framework under the Mines and Minerals Act. BURS (Botswana Unified Revenue Service) — the tax authority responsible for collecting mineral royalties and taxes. Pula Fund — Botswana's sovereign wealth fund (managed by the Bank of Botswana), designed to save diamond revenues for future generations.

National Assembly of Botswana — unicameral parliament with 65 members (57 elected, 8 specially elected). Citizens can contact their MPs through the парламентская website. Botswana is one of Africa's most stable multiparty democracies, with peaceful transfers of power since independence in 1966. The Ntlo ya Dikgosi (House of Chiefs) — an advisory body representing traditional leaders, with input on matters affecting tribal territories including горнодобывающая промышленность.

BY.s: State-controlled экономика ($76B ВВП) with significant manufacturing (20.3% ВВП). Potash горнодобывающая промышленность (Belaruskali is one of the world's largest producers). Oil refining (Naftan, Mozyr) processes Russian crude. Authoritarian governance under Lukashenko since 1994.

sectors.w: Belarus is the world's third-largest potash producer (Belaruskali). Potash горнодобывающая промышленность generates massive salt waste (solukhards) that contaminate groundwater and rivers. Когда downstream water contamination data is published alongside potash production revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: International санкции (EU, US, UK since 2021) have already weakened the пересекающийся интерес by restricting Belaruskali's market access. Когда sanctioned export revenues fall below экологический remediation costs, the economic case for continued expansion breaks.

Satellite-based экологический monitoring (salt waste accumulation, water contamination plumes) published by international organizations. Making экологический damage visible from space bypasses domestic data suppression and makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Potash горнодобывающая промышленность inherently generates salt waste. However, solution горнодобывающая промышленность and backfill techniques can reduce surface waste accumulation and groundwater contamination.
