i: Note: Belarus under Lukashenko is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. Independent media, гражданское общество, and trade unions face severe repression. There is no effective информатор protection. After the 2020 protests, thousands were imprisoned and major independent organizations were forcibly liquidated. Safe reporting channels include the Belarusian diaspora network, international trade union federations (IndustriALL Global Union), and international экологический organizations.

Belaruskali — Belarus's государственная potash company, one of the world's largest potash producers. Belaruskali operates six mines near Soligorsk. The company has been under EU, US, and UK санкции since 2021 following the forced diversion of Ryanair Flight 4978 and repression of democratic opposition. BPC (Belarusian Potash Company) — the former exclusive export trading arm of Belaruskali (sanctioned). Competitors include Nutrien (Canada), Mosaic (US), and K+S (Germany).

Note: Domestic regulatory institutions (Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Protection) are not independent under авторитарный governance. International mechanisms include: UNECE (United Nations Economic Commission for Europe) — Belarus is party to the Espoo Convention and the Convention on the Protection and Use of Transboundary Watercourses. EU санкции framework — Council Regulation (EU) restricting trade with Belaruskali and associated entities.

Note: Belarus has no functioning democratic legislature. The National Assembly (Natsionalnoye Sobranie) is not freely elected. International engagement channels: EU Eastern Partnership framework, OSCE (Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe), United Nations Human Rights Council Universal Periodic Review. The Belarusian democratic opposition in exile (led by Sviatlana Tsikhanouskaya) maintains a platform including экологический governance reform.

CD.s: Resource-rich but impoverished экономика ($71B ВВП). Mining dominates (28.81% of ВВП) — world's largest cobalt producer (70%+ global supply), significant copper, coltan, and tin. Conflict minerals remain a governance challenge. Agricultural employment is 60%+ but only 9.6% of ВВП.

sectors.w: DRC's cobalt is essential for EV batteries — downstream manufacturers (Tesla, Samsung SDI, CATL) face increasing ESG pressure. Когда supply chain traceability makes mine-level экологический and labor conditions visible to end consumers, W становится вычислимым from cobalt prices.
bp: Mandatory supply chain due diligence (EU Battery Regulation, US Dodd-Frank Section 1502) that requires full traceability to mine site. Когда artisanal miners must meet labor and экологический standards to access global markets, пересекающийся интерес в unregulated extraction ослабевает.

Blockchain or RMI-style traceability systems linking по каждому месторождению экологический and labor data to each cobalt lot. The EU Battery Regulation (effective 2027) will require carbon footprint declarations and due diligence — making W computable per unit of cobalt.

Частично разрушаемо. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes and generates waste. However, formalized artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность with proper safety and экологический management can reduce системная зависимость compared to unregulated extraction.
a: Report экологический or labor violations at mine sites to international monitoring organizations (IPIS, Global Witness)
Document child labor or unsafe working conditions — report through responsible sourcing audit channels (RMI, LBMA)
Report illegal mineral exports to CEEC (Centre d'Évaluation, d'Expertise et de Certification des substances minérales)
Glencore, CMOC (China Moly): Реализовать full supply chain traceability to mine site for all DRC cobalt
Принять IRMA (Initiative for Responsible Mining Assurance) certification for industrial operations
Инвестировать в formalization programs for artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность communities
Ministry of Mines: Обеспечить соблюдение 2018 Mining Code экологический provisions including community development obligations
CEEC: Усилить mineral certification to include экологический and labor compliance data
Cellule Technique de Coordination et de Planification Minière (CTCPM): Improve artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность registration and oversight
Свяжитесь с вашим Député national or Sénateur in the Parlement потребовать enforcement of the 2018 Mining Code экологический provisions
Support EU Battery Regulation implementation requiring full cobalt supply chain traceability
Продвигать через the African Union for continental responsible горнодобывающая промышленность standards
Добиваться OECD Due Diligence Guidance enforcement for all minerals sourced from DRC
i: CEEC (Centre d'Évaluation, d'Expertise et de Certification des substances minérales précieuses et semi-précieuses) — the DRC government agency responsible for evaluating, certifying, and controlling mineral exports. SAEMAPE (Service d'Assistance et d'Encadrement du Small Scale Mining) — the agency responsible for regulating artisanal and small-scale горнодобывающая промышленность. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — an independent research institute mapping горнодобывающая промышленность sites, armed group presence, and supply chain risks in the DRC. Global Witness — international NGO investigating the links between natural resource exploitation and conflict.

Glencore — operates Mutanda and Katanga Mining (KCC) copper-cobalt mines, among the world's largest. CMOC (China Molybdenum Co.) — operates Tenke Fungurume, one of the world's largest copper-cobalt mines. Entreprise Générale du Cobalt (EGC) — state-backed enterprise intended to monopolize artisanal cobalt purchasing (established 2019). RMI (Responsible Minerals Initiative) — industry-led supply chain due diligence program used by electronics and automotive manufacturers.

Ministry of Mines — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy, licensing, and the 2018 Mining Code (Code Minier), which increased royalty rates and introduced strategic substance classification for cobalt. CTCPM (Cellule Technique de Coordination et de Planification Minière) — the technical coordination unit for горнодобывающая промышленность sector planning. ITSCI (ITRI Tin Supply Chain Initiative) — a traceability program for tin, tantalum, and tungsten (3T) minerals from the DRC.

Parlement de la République démocratique du Congo — bicameral legislature consisting of the Assemblée nationale (500 members) and the Sénat (108 members). The DRC is a semi-presidential republic but governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers. EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) — effective 2027, requires carbon footprint declarations, recycled content minimums, and supply chain due diligence for batteries containing cobalt. OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals from Conflict-Affected and High-Risk Areas — the international standard for mineral supply chain responsibility.

CG.s: Oil-dependent экономика ($15.7B ВВП) with 34.74% combined oil and gas rents — one of Sub-Saharan Africa's highest. TotalEnergies and Eni are major operators. Governance challenges with long-ruling president (Sassou Nguesso since 1997). Significant tropical forest cover.

sectors.w: Congo-Brazzaville's oil production is in long-term decline from mature offshore fields. As extraction costs rise and reserves deplete, the пересекающийся интерес between international operators and government revenue ослабевает — diversification becomes necessary.
bp: Redirect oil revenues to economic diversification (forestry, agriculture, services) through transparent budget allocation. Когда non-oil sectors generate more employment and revenue, пересекающийся интерес в continued extraction from depleting fields breaks.
Реализовать EITI-standard per-block revenue and выбросы disclosure. Congo joined EITI in 2004 — extending to экологический data makes W computable per production unit.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report экологический violations at oil facilities to the Ministry of Environment
Document revenue discrepancies — report to EITI Congo multi-stakeholder group
Report concerns to international operator compliance channels (TotalEnergies, Eni)
TotalEnergies, Eni: Реализовать Paris-aligned transition plans for Congo operations
SNPC: Разработать economic diversification strategy using petroleum revenues
Принять per-block выбросы reporting standards
Ministry of Hydrocarbons: Усилить экологический conditions in production sharing contracts
EITI Congo: Expand reporting to include экологический impact data
Central Bank (BEAC): Integrate resource revenue volatility risk into macroprudential supervision
Продвигать через CEMAC for regional экологический standards in oil and gas extraction
Support EITI enhanced reporting with экологический metrics
Добиваться Central African Forest Initiative (CAFI) enforcement on forest protection as alternative revenue source
Leverage UNFCCC mechanisms for fossil fuel transition support
i: Ministère de l'Environnement, du Développement Durable et du Bassin du Congo — the environment ministry. SNPC (Société Nationale des Pétroles du Congo) — the national oil company. EITI Congo — the Republic of Congo has been an EITI member since 2004. Note: Whistleblower protections are minimal under current governance.

TotalEnergies — the largest oil operator in Congo-Brazzaville, operating the Moho Nord deepwater project and other fields. Eni — operates significant offshore concessions. SNPC (Société Nationale des Pétroles du Congo) — the national oil company holding state equity in all production sharing contracts.

Ministère des Hydrocarbures — oversees oil and gas policy and licensing. BEAC (Banque des États de l'Afrique Centrale) — the central bank of the CEMAC monetary zone (shared with Cameroon, CAR, Chad, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon). EITI Congo — publishes annual reports on extractive industry revenues.

Note: Congo-Brazzaville under President Sassou Nguesso is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée nationale (151 members) and Sénat (72 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International engagement channels: CEMAC (Communauté Économique et Monétaire de l'Afrique Centrale), African Union, CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) — a partnership between Central African countries and donors to protect tropical forests.

CI.s: Largest экономика in francophone West Africa ($87.1B ВВП). World's largest cocoa producer (~45% of global supply). Agriculture is 15.9% of ВВП with cocoa, coffee, and palm oil as main cash crops. Growing oil production (oil=0.7%). Rapid economic growth (~7% annual average).

sectors.w: Côte d'Ivoire's cocoa monoculture has driven 80%+ of original forest loss. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) will require обезлесение-free supply chains — when per-farm обезлесение data is linked to cocoa transactions, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance forces traceability to farm level. Когда cocoa buyers must verify zero-обезлесение, the пересекающийся интерес between traders and smallholders in clearing forest for new plantations breaks — agroforestry becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-farm экологический data (tree cover, soil carbon, water use) linked to cocoa lot traceability. The Cocoa and Forests Initiative already creates a framework — extending to mandatory data makes W computable from cocoa prices.

Частично разрушаемо. Cocoa monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity compared to native forest. However, cocoa agroforestry systems can maintain significant tree cover and biodiversity — Côte d'Ivoire's National REDD+ Strategy includes agroforestry targets.
a: Report illegal обезлесение for cocoa expansion to SODEFOR (Société de Développement des Forêts) or OIPR (Office Ivoirien des Parcs et Réserves)
Document child labor in cocoa production — report to CNS (Comité National de Surveillance des actions de lutte contre le travail des enfants)
Report pesticide misuse — notify ANADER (Agence Nationale d'Appui au Développement Rural)
Cocoa traders (Cargill, Barry Callebaut, Olam): Реализовать full farm-level traceability ahead of EUDR deadline
Инвестировать в cocoa agroforestry systems that maintain tree cover while improving yields
Принять living income reference price commitments for cocoa farmers
CCC (Conseil du Café-Cacao): Обеспечить соблюдение traceability requirements and link farmgate prices to экологический compliance
MINEDD (Ministry of Environment): Усилить enforcement against обезлесение in classified forests
ANADER: Scale agroforestry extension programs to all cocoa-growing regions
Свяжитесь с вашим Député in the Assemblée nationale потребовать enforcement of the Forest Code and protection of classified forests
Support EU Deforestation Regulation implementation with adequate transition support for smallholder farmers
Продвигать через the Cocoa and Forests Initiative for binding обезлесение targets
Добиваться living income benchmarks in international cocoa pricing through ICCO
i: SODEFOR (Société de Développement des Forêts) — the state forestry company responsible for managing classified forests, many of which have been illegally cleared for cocoa. OIPR (Office Ivoirien des Parcs et Réserves) — manages national parks and protected areas. CNS (Comité National de Surveillance) — the national committee monitoring child labor in cocoa, coordinated with the International Cocoa Initiative (ICI). ANADER — the national rural development support agency providing agricultural extension services.

Major cocoa traders operating in Côte d'Ivoire: Cargill, Barry Callebaut, Olam International, Sucden. These companies intermediate the majority of Ivorian cocoa exports. Cocoa and Forests Initiative (CFI) — a public-private partnership between cocoa-producing countries (Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana) and leading chocolate companies to end обезлесение in cocoa supply chains. The Conseil du Café-Cacao (CCC) — the Ivorian cocoa board that sets farmgate prices and regulates the sector.

CCC (Conseil du Café-Cacao) — the government body regulating Côte d'Ivoire's cocoa and coffee sectors, setting minimum farmgate prices, managing quality standards, and overseeing exports. MINEDD (Ministère de l'Environnement et du Développement Durable) — the environment ministry responsible for forest protection, climate policy, and экологический regulation.

Assemblée nationale de Côte d'Ivoire — unicameral parliament with 255 members. Citizens can contact deputies through the official Assembly website. Sénat — the upper house (99 members, established 2020). ICCO (International Cocoa Organization) — the intergovernmental body coordinating global cocoa policy, headquartered in Abidjan. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR, 2023/1115) — requires EU importers to verify that commodities including cocoa are not linked to обезлесение after December 2020.

CL.s: Upper-middle-income экономика ($330.3B ВВП) with massive горнодобывающая промышленность sector (16.23% of ВВП). World's largest copper producer (~27% of global supply) and second-largest lithium producer. Strong institutions and democratic governance. Renewable energy leader in Latin America (solar in Atacama).

sectors.w: Chile's copper and lithium горнодобывающая промышленность depletes water resources in the Atacama Desert (one of Earth's driest regions). Когда по каждому месторождению water consumption data is published alongside production revenue, W становится вычислимым from горнодобывающая промышленность output data.
bp: Реализовать water pricing that reflects true scarcity in горнодобывающая промышленность regions. Когда miners pay the real cost of water extraction in hyper-arid zones, пересекающийся интерес в water-intensive extraction methods ослабевает — desalination and dry processing become economically preferred.

Mandatory по каждому месторождению water balance, tailings chemistry, and выбросы disclosure. Chile's SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) already collects экологический data — making it publicly accessible per mine makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. However, dry processing, desalination, and tailings reprocessing can significantly reduce water dependence and waste generation.
a: Report экологический violations to SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente)
Document water rights violations — report to DGA (Dirección General de Aguas)
Use Chile's информатор law (Ley 21.015) and экологический complaint channels (denuncia ambiental) for protected reporting
CODELCO (state copper company): Transition to desalinated water for all operations
Принять Science Based Targets for выбросы reduction across горнодобывающая промышленность operations
Реализовать ICMM Mining Principles including tailings management standards
SMA: Increase экологический monitoring frequency and enforce water extraction limits at горнодобывающая промышленность operations
Sernageomin: Усилить tailings dam safety standards (Chile has 740+ tailings facilities)
Ministry of Mining: Реализовать the National Lithium Strategy with binding экологический standards
Свяжитесь с вашим Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional потребовать mandatory water-neutral горнодобывающая промышленность operations through desalination requirements
Support the Escazú Agreement on экологический access rights in Latin America (Chile has not ratified)
Advocate for OECD Due Diligence Guidance enforcement for горнодобывающая промышленность supply chains
Добиваться international coordination on critical mineral sustainability standards through the Minerals Security Partnership
i: SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) — Chile's экологический enforcement agency, responsible for monitoring compliance with экологический permits (RCA — Resolución de Calificación Ambiental). SMA can impose fines up to $8.2M and order facility closure. DGA (Dirección General de Aguas) — the national water authority managing water rights and monitoring extraction. SEA (Servicio de Evaluación Ambiental) — conducts экологический impact assessments for горнодобывающая промышленность projects.

CODELCO (Corporación Nacional del Cobre) — Chile's государственная copper company and the world's largest copper producer. CODELCO operates Chuquicamata, El Teniente, and other major mines. SQM (Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile) — one of the world's largest lithium producers, operating in the Salar de Atacama. Albemarle — US company operating lithium extraction in the Salar de Atacama alongside SQM. BHP, Anglo American — major international copper горнодобывающая промышленность companies operating in Chile.

Sernageomin (Servicio Nacional de Geología y Minería) — the national geological and горнодобывающая промышленность service, responsible for mine safety, tailings dam oversight, and geological surveys. Chile has over 740 tailings facilities, the largest inventory in the world. Ministry of Mining — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy including the 2023 National Lithium Strategy, which established state-led lithium development through public-private partnerships.

Congreso Nacional de Chile — bicameral legislature consisting of the Cámara de Diputadas y Diputados (155 members) and the Senado (50 members). Citizens can contact representatives through camara.cl and senado.cl. Chile is an OECD member with strong democratic institutions. Escazú Agreement — the Regional Agreement on Access to Information, Public Participation and Justice in Environmental Matters in Latin America and the Caribbean. Chile signed but has not ratified.

CM.s: Central African экономика ($53.3B ВВП) with oil production (2.94% combined rents) and significant agriculture (18.5% ВВП — cocoa, palm oil, timber). Forest cover declining due to logging and agricultural expansion. Governance challenges and Anglophone crisis.

sectors.w: Cameroon's oil production is declining from mature fields. As extraction costs rise, the пересекающийся интерес between operators (Perenco, Addax) and government revenue ослабевает — diversification to sustainable forestry and agriculture becomes economically rational.
bp: Redirect declining oil revenues to sustainable forest management and agricultural diversification. Cameroon's forests are a carbon sink worth more standing than cleared. Когда REDD+ payments exceed marginal oil revenue, пересекающийся интерес в continued extraction breaks.
Реализовать EITI-standard per-block экологический disclosure. Cameroon's EITI membership provides the framework — extending to экологический data makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report экологический violations to MINEPDED (Ministry of Environment, Nature Protection and Sustainable Разработатьment)
Document illegal logging or land seizures — report to international forestry monitoring organizations (Global Forest Watch)
Report through EITI Cameroon multi-stakeholder channels
Perenco, Addax/Sinopec: Реализовать экологический monitoring and выбросы reporting for all Cameroon operations
SNH: Разработать post-oil diversification strategy
Принять TCFD-aligned climate disclosure
MINMIDT (Ministry of Mines): Усилить экологический conditions in production licenses
MINEPDED: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический impact assessment requirements
EITI Cameroon: Expand reporting to экологический data
Свяжитесь с вашим Député in the Assemblée nationale потребовать transparent management of declining oil revenues
Support CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) for forest conservation as alternative revenue
Продвигать через CEMAC for regional экологический standards
Добиваться EITI enhanced reporting
i: MINEPDED (Ministère de l'Environnement, de la Protection de la Nature et du Développement Durable) — Cameroon's environment ministry. SNH (Société Nationale des Hydrocarbures) — the national hydrocarbons company managing state interests in oil and gas. EITI Cameroon — member since 2007. Note: Whistleblower protections are limited.

Perenco — the largest oil producer in Cameroon. Addax Petroleum (Sinopec subsidiary) — operates offshore concessions. SNH manages the state's petroleum interests and holds equity in production sharing contracts.

MINMIDT (Ministère des Mines, de l'Industrie et du Développement Technologique) — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность and industrial policy. CONAC (Commission Nationale Anti-Corruption) — Cameroon's anti-corruption commission.

Assemblée nationale du Cameroun — 180 members. Sénat — 100 members. Note: Cameroon's democratic institutions are constrained under long-ruling President Paul Biya (in power since 1982). International channels: CEMAC, African Union, CAFI.

CO.s: Major Latin American экономика ($418.8B ВВП) with significant oil (3.42% rents) and coal (0.73% rents) production. Ecopetrol is the largest company. Biodiversity hotspot (most biodiverse country per square kilometer). 2016 peace agreement with FARC opened new governance challenges in former conflict zones.

sectors.w: Colombia's current administration (Petro, 2022-) has announced a policy of no new oil exploration licenses. If maintained, пересекающийся интерес в fossil fuel expansion breaks as existing fields deplete. Colombia's renewable potential (hydro, solar, wind) provides viable alternatives.
bp: Maintain and implement the no-new-exploration-licenses policy while investing transition revenues in возобновляемая энергия. Когда energy investment flows shift from fossil to renewable, пересекающийся интерес в continued exploration breaks.

Mandatory по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for all Ecopetrol and international operator fields. Colombia's ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) already collects production data — extending to выбросы makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report экологический violations to ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales)
Document community health impacts near oil operations — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through Ecopetrol's ethics line or international operator compliance channels
Ecopetrol: Accelerate energy transition strategy with binding renewable targets
Реализовать TCFD-aligned reporting across all operations
Инвестировать в возобновляемая энергия in post-conflict zones to provide economic alternatives
MinAmbiente: Усилить экологический licensing for extractive projects in biodiverse regions
CREG: Реформировать energy tariffs to accelerate возобновляемая энергия deployment
ANH: Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы monitoring
Свяжитесь с вашим Representante or Senador in the Congreso to support the energy transition framework legislation
Усилить Colombia's NDC with binding sectoral выбросы reduction targets
Leverage OECD membership to advance экологический governance standards
Support the Leticia Pact for Amazon conservation as alternative economic model
i: ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales) — Colombia's экологический licensing authority, responsible for экологический impact assessment and compliance monitoring for extractive projects. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national human rights ombudsman. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office overseeing public resource management including oil revenues.

Ecopetrol — Colombia's largest company (88.5% государственная), responsible for most domestic oil production. Ecopetrol has announced energy transition targets but continues significant upstream investment. ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) — manages exploration and production contracts.

MinAmbiente (Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible) — Colombia's environment ministry. CREG (Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas) — the энергетический регуляторy commission. CAR (Corporaciones Autónomas Regionales) — regional экологический authorities.

Congreso de la República de Colombia — bicameral legislature: Cámara de Representantes (188 members) and Senado (108 members). Contact through camara.gov.co and senado.gov.co. Colombia is an OECD member (2020) with strong democratic institutions. The 2016 Peace Agreement (Acuerdo de Paz) created new governance frameworks for former conflict zones that intersect with extractive industry regulation.

CR.s: Upper-middle-income экономика ($95.4B ВВП) with 98%+ renewable electricity generation. No military since 1948. Services-dominant (68.8% ВВП). Leader in ecotourism and экологический policy. Low direct fossil fuel extraction. Main PST exposure through agricultural monoculture (pineapple, banana, palm oil).

sectors.w: Costa Rica's pineapple and banana monoculture uses intensive pesticide application that contaminates waterways. Когда per-farm pesticide runoff and water contamination data is published alongside export revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать agricultural export incentives to reward biodiversity-positive farming. Когда export tax benefits require экологический certification, the пересекающийся интерес between monoculture producers and exporters in chemical-intensive production ослабевает.

Mandatory per-farm water quality monitoring downstream of monoculture operations. Costa Rica's AyA (water utility) and SINAC already collect water data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Tropical monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, Costa Rica's Payment for Environmental Services (PSA) program demonstrates viable alternatives.
a: Report pesticide violations to SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado)
Document water contamination — report to MINAE (Ministry of Environment) or AyA
Use Costa Rica's labor protections and экологический complaint mechanisms
Agricultural exporters (Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita): Принять pesticide reduction targets
Инвестировать в organic certification and agroforestry transitions
Реализовать watershed-level экологический monitoring
MAG (Ministry of Agriculture): Реформировать export incentives to require экологический certification
MINAE: Усилить pesticide regulations and enforce water quality standards near monoculture areas
SETENA: Require cumulative экологический impact assessments for monoculture expansion
Свяжитесь с вашим Diputado in the Asamblea Legislativa потребовать pesticide reduction legislation for monoculture agriculture
Support the Escazú Agreement implementation (Costa Rica was an early advocate)
Leverage Costa Rica's экологический reputation to advance international agricultural sustainability standards
Добиваться green trade provisions in bilateral agreements
i: SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado) — the state phytosanitary service regulating pesticide use. MINAE (Ministerio de Ambiente y Energía) — the environment and energy ministry. AyA (Instituto Costarricense de Acueductos y Alcantarillados) — the national water utility. SETENA (Secretaría Técnica Nacional Ambiental) — conducts экологический impact assessments.

Costa Rica hosts operations of major fruit multinationals: Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita. CORBANA (Corporación Bananera Nacional) — the national banana corporation coordinating the sector. CANAPEP (Cámara Nacional de Productores y Exportadores de Piña) — the pineapple producers' association.

MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería) — Costa Rica's agriculture ministry. The PSA (Pago por Servicios Ambientales) program — Costa Rica's pioneering payment for экологический services program, which pays landowners to maintain forest cover, funded partly by a fuel tax.

Asamblea Legislativa de Costa Rica — unicameral parliament with 57 members. Citizens can contact representatives through asamblea.go.cr. Costa Rica is one of Latin America's strongest democracies and a global экологический leader. The Escazú Agreement — Costa Rica was one of the first signatories of this regional agreement on экологический access rights.

CU.s: Command экономика ($107.4B ВВП, though estimates vary due to dual currency system). Services-dominant (73.5% ВВП, driven by healthcare, education, tourism). Minimal resource extraction. Economic crisis exacerbated by US embargo and collapse of Venezuelan oil subsidies.

sectors.w: Cuba's sugar industry collapsed after Soviet subsidies ended, but remaining agriculture (state farms, cooperatives) relies on monoculture patterns. Cuba's organic farming necessity (post-Soviet fertilizer shortage) demonstrates alternative models. Making soil health data visible breaks system independence.
bp: Expand the urban agriculture and organoponics model that Cuba developed out of necessity. Когда organic production meets domestic food needs more reliably than import-dependent monoculture, пересекающийся интерес в conventional agriculture breaks.
Publish soil health, water quality, and biodiversity data from Cuba's extensive agricultural research system. Cuba's scientific institutions (INIFAT, ICA) generate data that could make W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Cuba's experience with organic farming post-1991 shows that системная зависимость on chemical inputs can be dramatically reduced through agroecological methods.
a: Document экологический degradation through academic research channels
Report through workplace union structures (CTC — Central de Trabajadores de Cuba)
Engage with international agricultural research partnerships
State agricultural enterprises: Scale organoponics and agroecological methods
AZCUBA: Diversify sugar industry toward bioenergy and specialty products
International partners: Support technology transfer for sustainable agriculture
MINAG: Expand support for agroecological transition
CITMA: Усилить экологический monitoring of agricultural practices
INIFAT: Publish research on agroecological transition outcomes
Support FAO technical cooperation programs for Cuban agricultural sustainability
Продвигать через CELAC for regional agricultural knowledge exchange
Добиваться relaxation of US embargo restrictions on agricultural technology transfer
Support South-South cooperation on agroecological methods developed in Cuba
i: Note: Cuba is a однопартийное государство. Independent гражданское общество, media, and labor organizations are not permitted. Reporting channels operate within state structures. CTC (Central de Trabajadores de Cuba) — the state-controlled trade union federation. INIFAT (Instituto Nacional de Investigaciones Fundamentales en Agricultura Tropical) — the national agricultural research institute. CITMA (Ministerio de Ciencia, Tecnología y Medio Ambiente) — the science and environment ministry.

AZCUBA (Empresa Azucarera) — Cuba's state sugar enterprise. State agricultural enterprises and UBPCs (Unidades Básicas de Producción Cooperativa) — cooperatives managing most agricultural production. Cuba's urban agriculture program is one of the world's most successful, producing significant food in cities through organoponics.

MINAG (Ministerio de la Agricultura) — Cuba's agriculture ministry. CITMA — oversees экологический policy and scientific research. The Asociación Nacional de Agricultores Pequeños (ANAP) — the national small farmers' association, which has been a key partner in agroecological transition.

Note: Cuba's Asamblea Nacional del Poder Popular (605 members) is the legislature but functions within a one-party system. International engagement channels: FAO (Cuba has received recognition for reducing hunger), CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States), NAM (Non-Aligned Movement). Cuba's agroecological experience is studied globally as a model for post-petrochemical agriculture.

CY.s: Small EU island экономика ($37.6B ВВП) with dominant services sector (76.5% ВВП, driven by financial services, shipping, and tourism). No significant resource extraction. Post-2013 banking crisis reforms strengthened financial regulation. Division between Republic of Cyprus and northern territory.

sectors.w: Cyprus's financial services sector has historically facilitated capital flows from Russia and other jurisdictions. EU AML directives and beneficial ownership прозрачность requirements make the welfare impact of opaque financial intermediation computable.
bp: Full implementation of EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives and beneficial ownership прозрачность. Когда financial secrecy is eliminated, the пересекающийся интерес between Cypriot service providers and clients seeking opacity ослабевает.

Mandatory publication of Country-by-Country Reporting (CbCR) data for entities registered in Cyprus. EU ATAD and DAC6 frameworks provide the mechanism — making tax planning structures visible breaks system independence.
Частично разрушаемо. Financial intermediation can relocate — but Cyprus's член ЕСship, common law heritage, and timezone advantages create switching costs.

i: MOKAS (Μονάδα Καταπολέμησης Αδικημάτων Συγκάλυψης / Unit for Combating Money Laundering) — Cyprus's financial intelligence unit. CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission) — the securities and financial markets regulator. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — the prudential supervisor of banks. Cyprus transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Cyprus hosts approximately 40 licensed banks and numerous investment firms. The Cyprus Investment Firms sector manages significant cross-border capital flows. CIFA (Cyprus Investment Funds Association) — the industry association representing investment fund managers.

CySEC — responsible for securities regulation and investment firm supervision. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — conducts banking supervision and AML compliance monitoring. ICPAC — the professional body for accountants and auditors in Cyprus.

Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) — unicameral parliament with 56 elected members (80 seats including 24 reserved for Turkish Cypriot community). Contact through parliament.cy. Cyprus is an член ЕС with robust democratic institutions. Moneyval (Council of Europe's Committee of Experts on the Evaluation of Anti-Money Laundering Measures) evaluates Cyprus's AML framework.

CZ.s: Central European industrial экономика ($347B ВВП) with strong manufacturing (19.9% ВВП, automotive-dominated). Small coal sector (lignite in northern Bohemia). член ЕС. Significant nuclear energy capacity (Dukovany, Temelín). Сфера услуг 60.2% ВВП.

sectors.w: Czechia's lignite горнодобывающая промышленность is concentrated in the Ústí nad Labem region (Sokolovská uhelná, Severní energetická). EU ETS carbon pricing makes Czech lignite uncompetitive — the пересекающийся интерес between mine operators and local employment breaks when carbon costs exceed revenue.
bp: Align with EU ETS carbon pricing and eliminate free allowances for Czech lignite power. Когда plants pay the full carbon price, lignite electricity becomes more expensive than alternatives and the пересекающийся интерес breaks.
Mandatory по каждому предприятию выбросы and health-impact reporting. Czech lignite plants cause significant air pollution — publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Lignite combustion releases CO₂ and pollutants by physical process.

i: ČIŽP (Česká inspekce životního prostředí / Czech Environmental Inspectorate) — the enforcement agency for экологический law, conducting inspections and imposing санкции. MŽP (Ministerstvo životního prostředí / Ministry of the Environment) — oversees экологический policy. Zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů (Act on Protection of Whistleblowers, 2023) — Czech transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

ČEZ Group — Czechia's largest energy company (70% государственная), operating coal, nuclear, and renewable power plants. Sev.en Energy — the largest private lignite горнодобывающая промышленность and power company. Sokolovská uhelná — operates lignite mines in the Sokolov basin.

ERÚ (Energetický regulační úřad / Energy Regulatory Office) — the independent энергетический регулятор. Czech Coal Commission (Uhelná komise) — established to recommend a coal phase-out date. Recommended 2033, but implementation timelines remain debated.

Parlament České republiky — bicameral: Poslanecká sněmovna (200 members) and Senát (81 members). Contact through psp.cz and senat.cz. EU Just Transition Fund — Czechia is eligible for significant funding for coal-dependent regions.

DK.s: Advanced Nordic экономика ($424.5B ВВП) with global leadership in wind energy (Vestas, Ørsted). Intensive livestock agriculture (28M pigs for 5.8M people) creates significant nitrogen pollution. Сфера услуг 63.5% ВВП. World's most ambitious climate law (70% reduction by 2030).

sectors.w: Denmark's intensive pig farming generates nitrogen pollution visible in marine dead zones (inner Danish waters, Baltic Sea). EU Nitrates Directive compliance data makes W computable from farm-level nitrogen balance sheets.
bp: Реформировать agricultural subsidies to penalize nitrogen surplus per hectare. Когда the пересекающийся интерес between livestock producers and feed importers is broken by internalizing the nitrogen externality, intensive livestock becomes unprofitable without subsidy.

Mandatory farm-level nitrogen and phosphorus balance disclosure. Denmark already has one of Europe's most detailed agricultural data systems — extending to mandatory public disclosure makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Intensive livestock inherently concentrates nutrients beyond ecosystem absorption. However, Denmark's leadership in biogas from manure demonstrates системная зависимость can be reduced through circular nutrient management.

Danish Crown — one of Europe's largest meat processors (farmer cooperative). Arla Foods — multinational dairy cooperative headquartered in Denmark. DLG Group — major agricultural input cooperative.

Miljøministeriet (Ministry of Environment) — экологический policy including agricultural regulation. Landbrugsstyrelsen (Danish Agricultural Agency) — administers CAP payments. The 2021 green agriculture agreement is one of Europe's most ambitious.

Folketinget — unicameral parliament (179 members). Contact through ft.dk. Klimaloven (Climate Act, 2020) — legally binding 70% выбросы reduction target by 2030. HELCOM (Helsinki Commission) — the governing body of the Convention on the Protection of the Marine Environment of the Baltic Sea Area.

DO.s: Caribbean's largest экономика ($124.3B ВВП) with tourism, manufacturing (free trade zones), and горнодобывающая промышленность (2.04% ВВП — Pueblo Viejo gold mine, one of the world's largest). Сфера услуг 59.8% ВВП. Climate vulnerable — hurricanes and sea level rise.

sectors.w: Pueblo Viejo gold mine (Barrick Gold) generates cyanide and mercury contamination risks. Когда по каждому месторождению water quality and health data is published alongside production revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Mandate экологический bonds that fully internalize mine closure and remediation costs. Когда горнодобывающая промышленность companies pre-fund cleanup, пересекающийся интерес в extraction without экологический accountability ослабевает.
Mandatory water quality monitoring and health-impact disclosure per mine. Publishing downstream contamination data makes W computable from горнодобывающая промышленность revenue.
Частично разрушаемо. Open-pit горнодобывающая промышленность disturbs landscapes. However, improved tailings management and water treatment can reduce системная зависимость.

Congreso Nacional — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (190 members) and Senado (32 members). The Dominican Republic is a presidential демократия.

DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B ВВП) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). Сельское хозяйство 14% ВВП (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. Когда production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, пересекающийся интерес в continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). Когда solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, пересекающийся интерес в gas-fired power generation breaks.

Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes экологический damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive информатор protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent экономика ($124.7B ВВП) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). Сельское хозяйство 9.5% ВВП (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the пересекающийся интерес. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: Реализовать the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. Когда democratic decisions override extraction interests, the пересекающийся интерес breaks through civic action.

Mandate per-block экологический impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's экологический data (Amazon обезлесение, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest экологический lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for экологический governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital экономика ($43.1B ВВП) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% ВВП). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ выбросы.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. Когда carbon pricing fully applies, the пересекающийся интерес between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. Когда subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, пересекающийся интерес в oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory по каждому предприятию lifecycle выбросы and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed экологический monitoring makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's экологический enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees экологический policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the государственная energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.

Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's энергетический регулятор. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant выбросы reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab экономика by population ($389.1B ВВП). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). Сельское хозяйство 13.7% ВВП. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for выбросы прозрачность. Per-field выбросы disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. Когда solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, пересекающийся интерес в gas-for-domestic-power ослабевает.

Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle выбросы visible per unit of production makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

i: EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency) — Egypt's экологический regulatory body. EGPC (Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil and gas company. EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on гражданское общество and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for возобновляемая энергия development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B ВВП). Agriculture dominates (34.8% ВВП, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of обезлесение (fr=5.6% ВВП equivalent in forest rents). Когда per-farm экологический data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include экологический conditionality. Когда agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, пересекающийся интерес в clearing forest for short-term cultivation ослабевает.

Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and деградация почв published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce системная зависимость.

i: Regional экологический protection authorities — Ethiopia's federal system devolves экологический management to regional states. EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission) — the national human rights institution. Разработатьment Agents (DAs) — government agricultural extension workers deployed at kebele (ward) level throughout rural Ethiopia.

ECX (Ethiopian Commodity Exchange) — the commodities trading platform for coffee, sesame, and other agricultural products. Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's природоохранный орган. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

Note: Ethiopia is a federal парламентская republic but democratic governance has been constrained by civil conflict (Tigray war 2020-2022). The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Разработатьment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic экономика ($298.7B ВВП) with strong forestry sector. Сфера услуг 62.2% ВВП, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% ВВП). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). член ЕС with robust экологический regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. Когда per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. Когда subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, пересекающийся интерес в plantation monoculture ослабевает.

Mandatory per-harvest экологический data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce системная зависимость.
a: Report forestry violations to ELY-keskus (Centre for Economic Разработатьment, Transport and the Environment)

i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for экологический monitoring and enforcement. SYKE (Suomen ympäristökeskus / Finnish Environment Institute) — the national экологический research and monitoring institute. Ilmoittajansuojelulaki (Whistleblower Protection Act, 2023) — Finnish transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African экономика ($20.9B ВВП) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the пересекающийся интерес between operators and government revenue ослабевает. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks пересекающийся интерес в extraction.
Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making экологический costs visible makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report экологический violations to ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux)
Document oil spills or contamination — report through operator compliance channels
Сообщить в EITI Gabon

GOC: Разработать forest carbon credit revenue streams
Принять biodiversity offset requirements for all operations

ANPN: Обеспечить соблюдение protected area boundaries against oil exploration

Support CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) for Gabon's forest conservation
Продвигать через OPEC for managed production decline from depleting fields

Support transition governance toward экологический прозрачность
i: ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux) — manages Gabon's 13 national parks (covering 11% of territory). GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company. EITI Gabon — member since 2004. Note: Gabon is under military transition government since August 2023 coup.
TotalEnergies — the largest oil producer in Gabon. Perenco, Assala Energy — other major operators. GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company.
Ministry of Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas policy. DGEPN (Direction Générale de l'Environnement et de la Protection de la Nature) — экологический directorate.

Note: Gabon is under military transition government (Comité pour la Transition et la Restauration des Institutions, CTRI) since August 2023. Democratic institutions are suspended. International channels: CEMAC, CAFI, African Union, OPEC membership. Gabon's 2021 deal with Norway's sovereign wealth fund for forest protection is a model for forest-state climate finance.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus экономика ($34.2B ВВП) with горнодобывающая промышленность sector (1.28% ВВП, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% ВВП). кандидат в ЕС country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese горнодобывающая промышленность (Chiatura) and copper горнодобывающая промышленность generate significant water pollution. EU accession экологический alignment will require improved monitoring. Когда water quality data is linked to горнодобывающая промышленность output, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU accession экологический alignment. Когда Georgia must meet EU экологический standards for горнодобывающая промышленность, пересекающийся интерес в low-cost extraction without экологический controls ослабевает.
Mandatory по каждому месторождению water quality and выбросы disclosure. Georgia's National Environmental Agency collects some data — extending to public disclosure makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce системная зависимость.
a: Report экологический violations to the Environmental Information and Education Centre
Document water contamination — report to NEA (National Environmental Agency)
Use Georgia's информатор protection mechanisms

Инвестировать в mine site rehabilitation

NEA: Increase экологический monitoring capacity

Advocate for Energy Community Treaty enforcement on экологический standards
Добиваться EITI membership for Georgia
i: NEA (National Environmental Agency) — responsible for экологический monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture — oversees экологический and agricultural policy. Georgia's Law on Freedom of Speech and Expression provides some protections for reporting.

Georgian Manganese — subsidiary of ERG (Eurasian Resources Group), operating the Chiatura manganese mines. RMG Copper — operates copper mines. Georgia's горнодобывающая промышленность sector is primarily controlled by international investors.
National Agency of Mines — responsible for горнодобывающая промышленность licensing and oversight. Georgia's EU Association Agreement (2014) includes provisions for экологический alignment.

Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) — unicameral legislature with 150 members. Contact through parliament.ge. Georgia is an кандидат в ЕС country (2023) and aspirant to full член ЕСship. EU Association Agreement — includes Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) with экологический provisions.

GH.s: West African экономика ($82.3B ВВП) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold горнодобывающая промышленность (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold горнодобывающая промышленность (galamsey) is a major экологический crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. Когда по каждому месторождению water quality data is published and linked to gold production, W становится вычислимым. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность with экологический standards and alternative livelihood programs. Когда legal small-scale горнодобывающая промышленность provides comparable income with less экологический damage, пересекающийся интерес в illegal extraction ослабевает.

Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to горнодобывающая промышленность areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce системная зависимость.

i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the горнодобывающая промышленность sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.

Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold горнодобывающая промышленность company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for экологический permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal горнодобывающая промышленность. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential демократия with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold горнодобывающая промышленность.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African экономика ($25B ВВП) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). Сельское хозяйство 31% ВВП. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite горнодобывающая промышленность displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making по каждому месторождению экологический data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring экологический and human rights compliance for bauxite. Когда buyers must verify mine-level conditions, пересекающийся интерес в low-cost, unregulated extraction ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. Когда downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W становится вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Open-pit bauxite горнодобывающая промышленность inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce системная зависимость.

CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): Усилить экологический monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to экологический and community data
Продвигать через ECOWAS for return to democratic governance and strengthened горнодобывающая промышленность regulation
Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
Добиваться ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for горнодобывающая промышленность-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent гражданское общество operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — экологический assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive Разработатьment International have documented impacts of bauxite горнодобывающая промышленность on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's горнодобывающая промышленность code establishing экологический obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on горнодобывающая промышленность revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international горнодобывающая промышленность company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and экологический impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B ВВП) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita ВВПs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the пересекающийся интерес between operators and government revenue ослабевает. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. Когда production revenue falls below government operating costs, пересекающийся интерес в continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field выбросы disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making экологический costs visible makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)
Document экологический violations to international NGOs
Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)

Support international anti-kleptocracy enforcement for misappropriated oil revenues

Добиваться re-engagement with EITI прозрачность requirements
Support international mechanisms for asset recovery and repatriation of stolen oil revenues
i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most авторитарный states. No independent media, гражданское общество, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on прозрачность. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU экономика ($256.2B ВВП) with dominant services sector (68% ВВП, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). Сельское хозяйство 3.8% ВВП (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). Когда diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реализовать front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. Когда UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the пересекающийся интерес between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF ослабевает.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Реформироватьulation mandates can reduce системная зависимость.

Принять voluntary front-of-pack labelling
Commission health-impact assessments

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures
Добиваться WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a парламентская демократия and член ЕС.

GT.s: Central American экономика ($113.2B ВВП) with agriculture at 9.8% ВВП (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% ВВП (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of ВВП).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives обезлесение and displaces indigenous communities. Когда per-farm обезлесение data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. Когда palm oil exports must prove zero-обезлесение origin, пересекающийся интерес в clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm экологический data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce системная зависимость.
a: Report illegal обезлесение to CONAP or INAB (National Forest Institute)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)
Palm oil companies (REPSA, NaturAceites): Принять RSPO certification and zero-обезлесение commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Guatemalan palm oil
Инвестировать в community benefit-sharing agreements
MARN (Ministry of Environment): Усилить экологический impact assessment for agricultural expansion
MAGA: Реформировать agricultural incentives to require экологический compliance
CONAP: Обеспечить соблюдение protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment
Свяжитесь с вашим Diputado in the Congreso de la República потребовать enforcement of экологический protections for indigenous territories
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Добиваться EUDR compliance support for small-scale farmers
i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with экологический defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Пальмовое масло) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing экономика globally ($24.7B ВВП, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). Нефтяная рента at 22.08%, горнодобывающая промышленность at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). Когда the full fiscal terms and экологический costs are disclosed and understood, W становится вычислимым from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. Когда Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), пересекающийся интерес в an extractive-favorable contract ослабевает.

Mandatory по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure and экологический monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global выбросы — extending to по каждому месторождению Guyana data makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report экологический violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): Реализовать по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for Guyana operations
Принять zero-flaring targets
Инвестировать в oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: Усилить экологический monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: Реализовать transparent investment and withdrawal rules
Свяжитесь с вашим Member of Parliament in the National Assembly потребовать independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund прозрачность aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
Добиваться Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for экологический permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style парламентская демократия. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B ВВП) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. Когда Scope 3 financed выбросы are disclosed per financial institution, W становится вычислимым from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed выбросы disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. Когда banks must disclose the выбросы their lending supports, пересекающийся интерес в fossil fuel financing ослабевает — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
