i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income экономика ($37.1B ВВП) with agriculture at 11.2% ВВП (coffee, palm oil, bananas). Обрабатывающая промышленность 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives обезлесение in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when обезлесение is linked to specific supply chains, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-обезлесение traceability for palm oil exports. Когда buyers must verify origin, пересекающийся интерес в forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based обезлесение monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce системная зависимость.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential демократия. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B ВВП) with dominant services sector (60.8% ВВП, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Сельское хозяйство 2.9% ВВП. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Реализовать EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.

Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B ВВП) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Сельское хозяйство 15.9% ВВП (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme обезлесение (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Обрабатывающая промышленность 26.2% ВВП (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total обезлесение (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The системная зависимость is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of обезлесение-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Реформировать agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Когда hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, пересекающийся интерес в continued обезлесение breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme системная зависимость — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing системная зависимость.

i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most экологический programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — экологический monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: член ЕС ($222.7B ВВП) with strong manufacturing (15.8% ВВП, automotive-focused). Сфера услуг 59.5% ВВП. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Сельское хозяйство 2.7% ВВП. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Когда health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Усилить the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax ослабевает пересекающийся интерес в high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.

i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 экономика ($1,396.3B ВВП). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% ВВП). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and горнодобывающая промышленность (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic обезлесение.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-обезлесение traceability to plantation level. Когда по каждому предприятиюation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W становится вычислимым from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-обезлесение supply chain traceability. Когда international buyers require verified обезлесение-free palm oil, пересекающийся интерес в clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession экологический data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors обезлесение by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, экологический regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest экологический NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Пальмовое масло) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential демократия and the world's third-largest демократия.

IE.s: High-income EU экономика ($609.2B ВВП, inflated by multinational profit booking). Обрабатывающая промышленность 29.6% ВВП (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Сельское хозяйство 1% ВВП but intensive dairy farming with significant methane выбросы. Сфера услуг 60.6% ВВП.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane выбросы by 20%+. Когда per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W становится вычислимым from agricultural production data.
bp: Реформировать CAP subsidies from production-linked to экологический outcome-linked. Когда dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, пересекающийся интерес в herd growth ослабевает.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's экологический regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's информатор protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Разработатьment Act (2021) sets legally binding выбросы budgets.

IL.s: High-tech экономика ($540.4B ВВП) with dominant services (72.5% ВВП). High military expenditure (8.78% ВВП). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field выбросы disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net выбросы benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Когда renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the пересекающийся интерес ослабевает.
Mandatory по каждому месторождению выбросы disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Не разрушаемо by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

Ministry of Environmental Protection: Усилить offshore экологический standards

Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's природоохранный орган. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has информатор protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the государственная gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Реформировать aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent экономика ($279.6B ВВП) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Когда gas capture infrastructure is built, пересекающийся интерес в flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking по каждому месторождению flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

EITI Iraq: Expand reporting to include flaring and выбросы data

i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for экологический regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for экологический policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a парламентская демократия but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B ВВП) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international санкции. Обрабатывающая промышленность 20.6% ВВП. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International санкции have already weakened the пересекающийся интерес by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Когда санкции enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Когда Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for возобновляемая энергия investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The пересекающийся интерес in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field экологический data is largely unavailable due to санкции-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's природоохранный орган, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective информатор protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for возобновляемая энергия development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced экономика ($33.3B ВВП) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Рыболовство are 5% of ВВП and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Когда ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Когда quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, пересекающийся интерес в maximum extraction ослабевает.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.

i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Рыболовство) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Рыболовство — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B ВВП) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower прозрачность than UK mainland. Когда beneficial ownership data and tax прозрачность information are published, W становится вычислимым from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership прозрачность aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Когда financial secrecy is eliminated, the пересекающийся интерес between service providers and opacity-seeking clients ослабевает.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.

i: JFSC (Jersey Финансовые услуги Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Финансовые услуги Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island экономика ($22B ВВП) with tourism and services dominant (60% ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 8% ВВП. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Когда soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Когда farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the пересекающийся интерес breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects экологический data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.

i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's природоохранный орган. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Рыболовство — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style парламентская демократия.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern экономика ($53.4B ВВП) with limited natural resources. Сфера услуг 60.4% ВВП. High military expenditure (4.8% ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash горнодобывающая промышленность (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Когда экологический cost data is published alongside горнодобывающая промышленность revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Internalize экологический costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into горнодобывающая промышленность operations through экологический levies. Когда miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, пересекающийся интерес в water-intensive extraction ослабевает.
Publish по каждому месторождению water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to горнодобывающая промышленность output makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's природоохранный орган. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the горнодобывающая промышленность regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a конституционная монархия with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest экономика ($120.3B ВВП) with agriculture at 22.5% ВВП (tea, coffee, horticulture). Сфера услуг 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Когда per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W становится вычислимым. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Реформировать agricultural export incentives to require экологический certification. Когда tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, пересекающийся интерес в intensive monoculture ослабевает.
Farm-level экологический data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce системная зависимость.

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's экологический regulator, responsible for экологический impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Рыболовство and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong экологический protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous экономика ($17.5B ВВП) dominated by gold горнодобывающая промышленность (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of ВВП, min=11.15%). Сельское хозяйство 8.6% ВВП. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary демократия (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Когда экологический monitoring data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all горнодобывающая промышленность. Когда remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making экологический costs visible makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

i: SAEPF — экологический agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state горнодобывающая промышленность interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — горнодобывающая промышленность regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income экономика ($46.4B ВВП) with garment manufacturing (27.8% ВВП) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta обезлесение ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes обезлесение computable.
bp: Реформировать economic land concession system to require экологический compliance. Когда concession holders face revocation for обезлесение, the пересекающийся интерес ослабевает.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.

i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts гражданское общество. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has экологический certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Рыболовство — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B ВВП) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the пересекающийся интерес ослабевает. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Когда the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, пересекающийся интерес в oil dependence breaks.
Per-field выбросы disclosure for KPC operations. Making экологический costs visible makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the экологический regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.

Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a конституционная монархия with genuine (if limited) парламентская debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest экономика ($291.5B ВВП) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and экологический incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S выбросы and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Когда non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, пересекающийся интерес в continued extraction breaks.
Per-field выбросы and экологический monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making экологический and health costs visible makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.

i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — природоохранный орган. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian экологический cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian экономика ($16.5B ВВП) with agriculture at 16.8% ВВП and горнодобывающая промышленность at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's горнодобывающая промышленность sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Когда экологический monitoring data is published alongside горнодобывающая промышленность revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Environmental bonds for горнодобывающая промышленность licenses. Когда remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine экологический data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making экологический costs visible makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.

i: MONRE — Laos's environment ministry. Note: Laos is a однопартийное государство (LPRP). No independent гражданское общество or media.
Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Разработатьment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed экономика ($20.1B ВВП, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the пересекающийся интерес has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Когда accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the пересекающийся интерес between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо — the crisis has already revealed системная зависимость. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island экономика ($99B ВВП) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Сельское хозяйство 8.3% ВВП (tea, rubber, coconut). Обрабатывающая промышленность 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural системная зависимость works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Когда transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, пересекающийся интерес в chemical-dependent monoculture ослабевает sustainably.
Per-estate экологический data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of системная зависимость (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and экологический governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B ВВП). Сфера услуг 63.6% ВВП. Обрабатывающая промышленность 14% ВВП. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Сельское хозяйство 2.6% ВВП.

sectors.w: Lithuania's health insurance system (VLK) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack health labelling implementation.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B ВВП, highest ВВП per capita globally). Сфера услуг 81.2% ВВП. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. Когда financed выбросы and beneficial ownership are disclosed, W становится вычислимым from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Когда fund-level financed выбросы and beneficial ownership are transparent, пересекающийся интерес в opaque financial intermediation ослабевает.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Fund domiciliation can relocate, but Luxembourg's legal infrastructure and EU access create switching costs.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B ВВП). Сфера услуг 64.6% ВВП. Forestry significant. Сельское хозяйство 4% ВВП. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B ВВП) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The пересекающийся интерес is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Когда oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), пересекающийся интерес в capturing oil infrastructure ослабевает.
NOC по каждому месторождению production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to экологический data makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African экономика ($160.6B ВВП) with agriculture at 10.6% ВВП and growing возобновляемая энергия sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Обрабатывающая промышленность 15.3% ВВП.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate горнодобывающая промышленность generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Когда по каждому месторождению экологический data is published alongside production revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Когда OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, пересекающийся интерес в low-cost extraction ослабевает.

Mandatory по каждому месторождению экологический disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable по каждому месторождению data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce системная зависимость.

Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность and экологический policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a конституционная монархия with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B ВВП) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest ВВП per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

MD.s: Small Eastern European экономика ($18.2B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 7.1% ВВП (wine, agriculture). Сфера услуг 62.3%. кандидат в ЕС country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot экономика ($17.4B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 22.5% ВВП. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating обезлесение (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

Satellite обезлесение monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. Делает W вычислимым.
Extreme системная зависимость. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan экономика ($17B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 14.3% ВВП. Сфера услуг 56.2%. кандидат в ЕС country. Coal-dependent energy. Сельское хозяйство 6.1% ВВП.

ML.s: Sahelian экономика ($26.8B ВВП) with gold горнодобывающая промышленность (16.18% ВВП) and agriculture (33.3% ВВП). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

Частично разрушаемо. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность системная зависимость.

MM.s: Resource-rich экономика ($74.1B ВВП) under military junta since 2021 coup. Газовая рента 4.4%. Jade and gem горнодобывающая промышленность (est. $31B/year — more than formal ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 20.8% ВВП. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Когда jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W становится вычислимым.
bp: International санкции targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Когда revenue is blocked, the пересекающийся интерес between the military and jade горнодобывающая промышленность ослабевает.
Supply chain прозрачность for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked экономика ($23.8B ВВП). Mining at 26.57% ВВП (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% ВВП. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary демократия — rare in the region.

MO.s: Casino and tourism экономика ($49.5B ВВП). Сфера услуг 83.8% ВВП. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

bp: Enhanced MGA licensing requirements with harm data disclosure. Makes пересекающийся интерес в revenue without accountability weaker.
Per-licensee problem gambling and AML compliance data publication. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Online gambling creates addiction risk. Harm reduction measures can reduce системная зависимость.

Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU парламентская демократия.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island экономика ($14.9B ВВП). Сфера услуг 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Обрабатывающая промышленность 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). Когда beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. Когда financial opacity is eliminated, the пересекающийся интерес ослабевает.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.

National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a парламентская демократия with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income экономика ($11.3B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 31.8% ВВП — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the пересекающийся интерес between tobacco growers and buyers ослабевает.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Когда alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, пересекающийся интерес в tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of деградация почв and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Делает W вычислимым.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce системная зависимость.

i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — природоохранный орган. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Разработатьment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential демократия. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income экономика ($422.2B ВВП). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Обрабатывающая промышленность 22.5% ВВП (electronics, automotive). Сфера услуг 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Когда по каждому предприятиюation экологический data is linked to trade, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-обезлесение traceability. Когда buyers verify origin, пересекающийся интерес в forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Пальмовое масло) certification with independently verifiable экологический data per estate. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Пальмовое масло Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Пальмовое масло) — the national mandatory certification scheme.

Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal конституционная монархия and парламентская демократия.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing экономика ($22.7B ВВП). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Сельское хозяйство 25.2% ВВП. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Когда per-project экологический and social cost data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and экологический standards. Когда development is linked to social outcomes, пересекающийся интерес в extraction without accountability ослабевает.
Per-project экологический disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and горнодобывающая промышленность policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income экономика ($13.4B ВВП) with горнодобывающая промышленность at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Сельское хозяйство 7.3% ВВП. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium горнодобывающая промышленность (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Когда по каждому месторождению экологический monitoring is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium горнодобывающая промышленность. Когда miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, пересекающийся интерес в water-intensive extraction ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring disclosure. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Uranium горнодобывающая промышленность generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate системная зависимость.

Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese государственная). Namibia also has significant diamond горнодобывающая промышленность (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential демократия with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian экономика ($19.9B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 34.5% ВВП. Uranium горнодобывающая промышленность (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium горнодобывающая промышленность (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Когда remediation costs are pre-funded, пересекающийся интерес in extraction without accountability ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Uranium горнодобывающая промышленность generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate системная зависимость.

Ministry of Mines — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American экономика ($19.7B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 14.4% ВВП. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Сфера услуг 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold горнодобывающая промышленность generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Когда экологический data is published, W становится вычислимым.

Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.

Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — горнодобывающая промышленность regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian экономика ($42.9B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 21.9% ВВП. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of ВВП. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Когда per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Когда hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, пересекающийся интерес в unsustainable cultivation ослабевает.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce системная зависимость.

i: DoE — природоохранный орган under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Разработатьment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced экономика ($260.2B ВВП) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Сельское хозяйство 4.4% ВВП but outsized экологический footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Сфера услуг 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Когда per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реализовать the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Когда farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, пересекающийся интерес в herd expansion ослабевает.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.

i: Regional councils — the primary экологический regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national экологический policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong информатор protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.

NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve экологический bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf экономика ($107.1B ВВП) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Разработатьment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Когда hydrogen revenue streams are established, пересекающийся интерес в oil dependence ослабевает.
Per-field выбросы disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's экологический regulator. PDO (Petroleum Разработатьment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing парламентская activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant экономика ($86.5B ВВП) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Сфера услуг 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá горнодобывающая промышленность contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The пересекающийся интерес between the горнодобывающая промышленность company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of горнодобывающая промышленность contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the пересекающийся интерес through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing системная зависимость.
