i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — природоохранный орган. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the горнодобывающая промышленность contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees горнодобывающая промышленность concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich экономика ($289.2B ВВП) with горнодобывающая промышленность at 12.1% ВВП (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Сельское хозяйство 7.3%. Сфера услуг 51.3%. Social conflicts around горнодобывающая промышленность are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's горнодобывающая промышленность sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Когда экологический monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Когда indigenous communities can effectively negotiate экологический conditions, пересекающийся интерес в extraction without consent ослабевает.
Mandatory по каждому месторождению экологический monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's горнодобывающая промышленность экологический standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: Сообщить в OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through горнодобывающая промышленность company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: Реализовать community development agreements
Принять international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish по каждому месторождению экологический data
OEFA: Increase экологический monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: Усилить экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): Обеспечить соблюдение water quality standards downstream of mines
Свяжитесь с вашим Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) потребовать enforcement of consulta previa and экологический monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Добиваться EITI enhanced reporting with экологический data
i: OEFA — Peru's экологический enforcement agency for the горнодобывающая промышленность sector, conducting inspections and imposing санкции. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts экологический impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and горнодобывающая промышленность ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island экономика ($31.8B ВВП). Mining at 14.41% ВВП, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Сельское хозяйство 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's горнодобывающая промышленность sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic экологический damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory экологический bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Когда remediation is pre-funded, пересекающийся интерес in low-cost disposal ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: Реализовать international экологический standards
Address legacy contamination
Принять EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): Усилить экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность leases
CEPA: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический standards
EITI PNG: Expand to экологический data
Свяжитесь с вашим member of the National Parliament (111 members) потребовать экологический bonds for all горнодобывающая промышленность operations
Support customary landowner rights in горнодобывающая промышленность negotiations
Продвигать через Pacific Islands Forum for regional экологический standards
Добиваться international accountability for горнодобывающая промышленность legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's природоохранный орган. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — горнодобывающая промышленность regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the горнодобывающая промышленность regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a конституционная монархия (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style парламентская демократия.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian экономика ($461.6B ВВП). Сфера услуг 63.2% ВВП. Сельское хозяйство 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Обрабатывающая промышленность 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel горнодобывающая промышленность (for EV batteries) generates significant экологический damage on small islands. Когда по каждому месторождению экологический data is linked to nickel exports, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for горнодобывающая промышленность permits. President Duterte's 2017 горнодобывающая промышленность audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks пересекающийся интерес в non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine экологический monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: Сообщить в DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through гражданское общество organizations
Сообщить в Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: Реализовать international экологический standards
Принять responsible горнодобывающая промышленность certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: Усилить экологический monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require экологический bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): Обеспечить соблюдение pollution standards
Свяжитесь с вашим Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator потребовать enforcement of горнодобывающая промышленность экологический standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced экологический protections
Продвигать через ASEAN for regional горнодобывающая промышленность standards
Добиваться EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages горнодобывающая промышленность regulation. Philippines has relatively active гражданское общество and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs горнодобывающая промышленность operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential демократия.

PK.s: Large экономика ($371.6B ВВП) with agriculture at 23.7% ВВП (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Обрабатывающая промышленность 13.2%. Сфера услуг 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Когда per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Когда farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, пересекающийся интерес в water-intensive monoculture ослабевает.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power Разработатьment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: Разработать water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
Инвестировать в drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: Реформировать water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): Обеспечить соблюдение provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
Свяжитесь с вашим MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator потребовать agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
Добиваться international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal природоохранный орган. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own экологический agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal парламентская демократия.

PL.s: Major EU экономика ($917.8B ВВП) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Обрабатывающая промышленность 16.1% ВВП. Сфера услуг 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Когда full carbon costs are internalized, the пересекающийся интерес between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The пересекающийся интерес breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant выбросы and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: Сообщить в GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in горнодобывающая промышленность regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish информатор law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: Разработать coal phase-out plans with worker transition
Инвестировать в offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
Принять per-unit выбросы reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): Реформировать tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: Реализовать National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
Свяжитесь с вашим Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat потребовать accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
Добиваться territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief экологический inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal горнодобывающая промышленность company (государственная, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the энергетический регулятор. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the экологический fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with горнодобывающая промышленность unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B ВВП) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of ВВП — among world's highest pharma concentration). Сфера услуг 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Когда diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Когда imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, пересекающийся интерес в high-margin processed imports ослабевает.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Делает W вычислимым.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: Сообщить в FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal информатор protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
Принять voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: Реализовать nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
Добиваться local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal информатор protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B ВВП, severely constrained by occupation). Сельское хозяйство 7.4% ВВП. Сфера услуг 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Когда water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Когда Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, пересекающийся интерес в restricting agricultural development ослабевает.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme системная зависимость. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
Сообщить в international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
Инвестировать в water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document экологический impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
Продвигать через UN for equitable water allocation
Добиваться World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian природоохранный орган. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU экономика ($313.3B ВВП). Сфера услуг 66.3% ВВП. Сельское хозяйство 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Обрабатывающая промышленность 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Реализовать EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Делает W вычислимым.
Not fully breakable. Реформироватьulation mandates reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese информатор law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Реформироватьulate products
Принять front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): Реализовать labelling
ASAE: Обеспечить соблюдение marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
Свяжитесь с вашим Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) потребовать health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's информатор protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a парламентская демократия.

PY.s: Landlocked South American экономика ($44.5B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 10.7% ВВП (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Обрабатывающая промышленность 19% ВВП. Сфера услуг 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe обезлесение from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco обезлесение. Когда per-farm обезлесение and деградация почв data is linked to soy exports, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-обезлесение soy. Когда EU buyers require verified обезлесение-free origin, пересекающийся интерес в Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based обезлесение monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce деградация почв.
a: Report illegal обезлесение to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Реализовать zero-обезлесение soy sourcing for Paraguay
Принять Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Инвестировать в yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Обеспечить соблюдение the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate экологический standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Усилить forest monitoring and enforcement
Свяжитесь с вашим Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional потребовать extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur экологический provisions enforcement
Добиваться indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where обезлесение continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated экономика ($219.2B ВВП). Промышленность 58.2% ВВП. Нефтяная рента 15.28% ВВП, gas rents 12.01% ВВП — world's largest LNG exporter. Сфера услуг 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ выбросы globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Когда importers reduce LNG dependence, the пересекающийся интерес ослабевает.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, пересекающийся интерес в fossil gas dependence ослабевает.
Per-field выбросы and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle выбросы.
a: Сообщить в QatarEnergy HSE division
Документировать через international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Сообщить в Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
Инвестировать в blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: Обеспечить соблюдение air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate выбросы reduction targets
Продвигать через GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional выбросы standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
Добиваться LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on выбросы intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — государственная, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — экологический regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: член ЕС экономика ($382.6B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 13.2% ВВП. Газовая рента 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Сфера услуг 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite член ЕСship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Когда soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Когда subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, пересекающийся интерес в exhaustive monoculture ослабевает.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce системная зависимость.

Сообщить в Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
Документировать через Agent Green or EuroNatur

Agricultural associations: Принять soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: Усилить Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring

Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
Продвигать через European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian экологический NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — экологический protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). член ЕС since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan экономика ($90.1B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 12.7%. Угольная рента 0.24% ВВП — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. кандидат в ЕС country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant выбросы and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Сообщить в Ministry of Environmental Protection
Документировать через CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Разработатьment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Разработать lignite phase-out roadmap
Инвестировать в solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara горнодобывающая промышленность basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): Реформировать tariffs to reflect экологический costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: Принять Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: Обеспечить соблюдение compliance
Свяжитесь с вашим Narodni poslanik in the Narodna skupština (250 members) потребовать a coal phase-out timeline
Support EU accession экологический chapter benchmarks
Продвигать через Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
Добиваться EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — природоохранный орган. CEKOR — Serbian экологический NGO. RES Foundation — возобновляемая энергия advocacy.

EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara горнодобывающая промышленность basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — энергетический регулятор. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. кандидат в ЕС country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon экономика ($2,173.8B ВВП). Нефтяная рента 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, горнодобывающая промышленность 2.05% ВВП. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Военные расходы 7.05% ВВП. Authoritarian governance under international санкции since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western санкции and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the пересекающийся интерес.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Когда importers eliminate dependence, пересекающийся интерес в Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced прозрачность — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Не разрушаемо. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to санкции enforcement authorities
Документировать через investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Обеспечить соблюдение санкции compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Усилить enforcement against evasion
EU: Close санкции loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international санкции on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
Добиваться addressing Russia's shadow fleet экологический risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic гражданское общество is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian экологический issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU санкции packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — санкции enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international санкции coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African экономика ($14.3B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 24.6% ВВП. Лесная рента 3.97%. Сфера услуг 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but авторитарный governance. Strong экологический policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and деградация почв. Когда soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the пересекающийся интерес.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Документировать через RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Разработатьment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Принять terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Разработатьment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: Обеспечить соблюдение hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available парламентская channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes экологический cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union экологический governance frameworks
i: REMA — the экологический management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes экологический sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected экономика ($49.7B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 22.2% ВВП. Mining 6.63% (gold). Нефтяная рента 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold горнодобывающая промышленность uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Когда gold revenue flows are traced, W становится вычислимым.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Когда refiners verify provenance, the пересекающийся интерес between armed groups and gold revenues ослабевает.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Документировать через INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Реализовать enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International санкции bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council санкции on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Добиваться UAE cooperation on gold trade прозрачность
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors санкции and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Разработатьment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic экономика ($603.7B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 13% ВВП. Mining 1% ВВП (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Сфера услуг 66.4%. Strong экологический regulations. член ЕС. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore горнодобывающая промышленность (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Когда по каждому месторождению экологический and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and экологический remediation. Когда LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, пересекающийся интерес в low-cost extraction ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Частично разрушаемо. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that горнодобывающая промышленность's downstream системная зависимость on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Сообщить в Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Сообщить в Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Документировать через Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Реализовать enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Усилить экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous экологический review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into горнодобывающая промышленность assessments
Свяжитесь с вашим Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) потребовать indigenous consent requirements in горнодобывающая промышленность permits
Продвигать через EU Critical Raw Materials Act for экологический and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Добиваться EU taxonomy alignment of горнодобывающая промышленность экологический standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — экологический protection agency. Bergsstaten — the горнодобывающая промышленность inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — государственная iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals горнодобывающая промышленность and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized экологический courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs горнодобывающая промышленность permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a конституционная монархия and член ЕС.

SG.s: Advanced city-state экономика ($547.4B ВВП). Сфера услуг 73% ВВП. Обрабатывающая промышленность 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Когда refinery выбросы and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's углеродный налог rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Когда refining margins incorporate carbon costs, пересекающийся интерес в unpriced выбросы ослабевает.
Per-refinery выбросы and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce системная зависимость over time.
a: Сообщить в NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS информатор channels for financial misconduct
Документировать через SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Реализовать carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Инвестировать в green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate углеродный налог escalation timeline
MAS: Усилить climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate возобновляемая энергия targets
Engage through available парламентская channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN экологический cooperation frameworks
Продвигать через Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Добиваться IMO shipping выбросы standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — экологический regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — энергетический регулятор. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a парламентская republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small член ЕС экономика ($73B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 19.4% ВВП. Сфера услуг 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). член ЕС since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong экологический awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Когда soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Когда subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, пересекающийся интерес в exhaustive monoculture ослабевает.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Разработатьment). Делает W вычислимым.

Частично разрушаемо. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Сообщить в ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Сообщить в Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)
Документировать через Slovenian экологический organizations (Focus, Umanotera)
Agricultural cooperatives: Принять organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: Реализовать manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: Усилить CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: Обеспечить соблюдение nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
Свяжитесь с вашим Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) потребовать stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Продвигать через Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Разработатьment. Focus — экологический NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. член ЕС since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European член ЕС ($140.9B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 16.3% ВВП — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Сфера услуг 60%. член ЕС since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Когда per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Когда consumers can identify ultra-processing, пересекающийся интерес в opaque ingredient lists ослабевает.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Сообщить в ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
Сообщить в ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)
Документировать через consumer protection organizations
Food processors: Реформироватьulate to reduce ultra-processing
Retailers (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco): Принять front-of-pack labeling
Advertisers: Restrict UPF marketing to children
Ministry of Health: Реализовать front-of-pack nutrition labeling
ŠVPS: Усилить food composition standards
Ministry of Agriculture: Support local food production incentives
Свяжитесь с вашим Poslanec in the Národná rada (150 members) потребовать mandatory front-of-pack labeling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets
Продвигать через WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Разработатьment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. член ЕС since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African экономика ($32.8B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 16.6% ВВП. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Рыболовство crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe перелов by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Когда per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Реформировать fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Когда EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, пересекающийся интерес в перелов ослабевает.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Документировать через ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Принять sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Рыболовство: Реформировать fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Рыболовство Commission): Coordinate regional management
Свяжитесь с вашим Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) потребовать reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Продвигать через AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Добиваться RFMO (Regional Рыболовство Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Рыболовство and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B ВВП). Limited economic data available. Лесная рента 11.24% ВВП (charcoal — major обезлесение driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Когда charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to обезлесение data, W становится вычислимым.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Когда the ban is effectively enforced, the пересекающийся интерес between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade ослабевает.
Satellite обезлесение monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Сообщить в UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Документировать через Somali экологический organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): Обеспечить соблюдение import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: Инвестировать в LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: Обеспечить соблюдение charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: Усилить monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
Добиваться alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute экологический programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors санкции including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN санкции framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American экономика ($35.4B ВВП). Сфера услуг 61% ВВП. Сельское хозяйство 4.4%. Обрабатывающая промышленность 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of ВВП). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Когда CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Когда sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, пересекающийся интерес в unregulated pesticide/herbicide use ослабевает.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Сообщить в MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Реализовать worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Принять mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Инвестировать в worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Продвигать через PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Добиваться ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — экологический regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated экономика ($23.6B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 43.1% ВВП — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Нефтяная рента 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Когда oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Когда reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, пересекающийся интерес в opaque extraction ослабевает.
Oil revenue flow прозрачность as condition of reconstruction assistance and санкции relief. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in экологический standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document экологический damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Принять экологический standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on экологический and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Продвигать через UN-led political process for resource revenue прозрачность
Добиваться экологический damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian экономика ($19.5B ВВП). Нефтяная рента 16.75% ВВП. Сельское хозяйство 37.7%. Лесная рента 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue прозрачность mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Когда oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Restore oil revenue прозрачность mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks пересекающийся интерес в opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Документировать через international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Сообщить в international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Реализовать экологический and прозрачность standards
Savannah Energy: Принять EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue прозрачность
Ministry of Petroleum: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue прозрачность
Продвигать через African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Добиваться World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission экологический programs
i: Note: Chad's гражданское общество space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue прозрачность coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African экономика ($10.7B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 21.3% ВВП. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Сфера услуг 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate горнодобывающая промышленность (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Когда по каждому месторождению экологический data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Когда export markets require cadmium limits, пересекающийся интерес в unprocessed phosphate extraction ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Сообщить в ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Документировать через community organizations in phosphate горнодобывающая промышленность regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Инвестировать в cadmium removal technology
Реализовать mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Принять international экологический reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Усилить экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность permits
ANGE: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to экологический data disclosure
Engage through available парламентская channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS экологический governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Добиваться EITI full membership with экологический disclosure
i: ANGE — national экологический management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — горнодобывающая промышленность oversight. ANGE — экологический assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to парламентская system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian экономика ($526.5B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 24.3% ВВП (automotive, electronics, food processing). Сельское хозяйство 8.7%. Сфера услуг 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Когда per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators ослабевает пересекающийся интерес в opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Сообщить в Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Документировать через Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Реформироватьulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Принять transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Усилить sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
Свяжитесь с вашим สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) потребовать UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Продвигать через WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Добиваться Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a конституционная монархия. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian экономика ($14.2B ВВП). Mining 7.09% ВВП (gold, silver, antimony). Сельское хозяйство 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of ВВП from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's горнодобывающая промышленность sector includes artisanal gold горнодобывающая промышленность with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Когда per-facility выбросы and экологический data are published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Когда aluminum and gold buyers require экологический compliance verification, пересекающийся интерес в unregulated production ослабевает.
Per-facility экологический monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride выбросы and gold горнодобывающая промышленность mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. TALCO smelter выбросы can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Документировать через Central Asian экологический networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Инвестировать в выбросы reduction technology
Gold горнодобывающая промышленность companies: Принять mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require экологический compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Усилить экологический enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO выбросы modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to экологический data
Support international pressure for экологический standards in Tajik горнодобывающая промышленность through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Продвигать через OSCE экологический dimension for monitoring support
Добиваться Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность
Support EITI candidacy advancement with экологический disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for экологический reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik горнодобывающая промышленность.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold горнодобывающая промышленность includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — экологический regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively однопартийное государство (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed экономика ($51.4B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 18% ВВП. One of the world's most авторитарный states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Когда methane data is published, W становится вычислимым despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Когда buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, пересекающийся интерес в unmonitored gas production ослабевает.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Делает W вычислимым without government cooperation.
Не разрушаемо. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic гражданское общество exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Документировать через Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle выбросы
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Продвигать через UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Добиваться methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent гражданское общество, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting экологический issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an авторитарный state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African экономика ($51.3B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 9.7% ВВП. Нефтяная рента 1.55%. Обрабатывающая промышленность 14.8%. Сфера услуг 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack прозрачность. Когда по каждому месторождению экологический and revenue data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue прозрачность. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to ВВП but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks пересекающийся интерес в opaque revenue management.
Per-field экологический monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Сообщить в ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Документировать через Tunisian экологический organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Принять revenue прозрачность standards
Инвестировать в solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Реализовать hydrocarbon revenue прозрачность
ANPE: Усилить экологический monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate возобновляемая энергия targets
Engage through available парламентская channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Продвигать через Union for the Mediterranean for возобновляемая энергия investment
Добиваться EITI membership as governance прозрачность measure
i: ANPE — экологический protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on экологический justice. Tunisia has relatively active гражданское общество despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and возобновляемая энергия agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income экономика ($1,359.1B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 16.8% ВВП. Сфера услуг 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Сельское хозяйство 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Когда coal plant health costs are internalized, пересекающийся интерес в cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Когда coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant выбросы and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Сообщить в ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Документировать через TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): Разработать coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: Инвестировать в renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): Реформировать tariffs to reflect экологический costs
ÇŞB: Реализовать emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support возобновляемая энергия investment framework
Свяжитесь с вашим Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) потребовать coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
Продвигать через G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Добиваться EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework экологический standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish экологический NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy экономика ($25.6B ВВП). Газовая рента 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% ВВП. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Обрабатывающая промышленность 14.4%. Сфера услуг 59.2%. Parliamentary демократия.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, пересекающийся интерес в fossil fuel dependence ослабевает naturally.
