bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Когда production costs rise on mature fields, пересекающийся интерес в fossil fuel dependence ослабевает as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility выбросы and экологический monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Сообщить в EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Сообщить в MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Документировать через Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (экологический NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Разработать gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Реализовать carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process выбросы
EMA: Усилить air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Разработать возобновляемая энергия framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): Реформировать energy pricing
Свяжитесь с вашим Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) потребовать economic diversification and возобновляемая энергия policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Продвигать через Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Добиваться IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active экологический NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary демократия with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African экономика ($78.8B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 23.3% ВВП. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Лесная рента 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Сфера услуг 29.6%. Growing экономика with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold горнодобывающая промышленность (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Когда по каждому месторождению экологический data is published alongside revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and прозрачность requirements. Когда enforced alongside экологический monitoring, пересекающийся интерес в opaque extraction ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Mercury-free artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность and improved tailings management reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
Сообщить в Mining Commission
Документировать через LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): Реализовать international экологический standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): Принять enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish экологический and community impact data
Mining Commission: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность licenses
NEMC: Усилить экологический impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include экологический data
Свяжитесь с вашим Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) потребовать экологический enforcement in горнодобывающая промышленность
Support EITI enhanced reporting with экологический data
Продвигать через EAC for regional горнодобывающая промышленность экологический standards
Добиваться Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal горнодобывающая промышленность
i: NEMC — природоохранный орган. Mining Commission — горнодобывающая промышленность sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian экологический law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue прозрачность advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government горнодобывающая промышленность entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected экономика ($190.7B ВВП). Mining 5.32% ВВП. Военные расходы 34.48% ВВП (wartime). Сельское хозяйство 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. кандидат в ЕС country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive экологический damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's горнодобывающая промышленность sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive экологический damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent экологический standards. Когда reconstruction экологический data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring экологический standards in post-war reconstruction. Когда reconstruction adheres to EU экологический acquis, пересекающийся интерес в rapid but dirty rebuilding ослабевает.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: Сообщить в Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
Документировать через OSCE экологический monitoring
Report war-related экологический damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): Реализовать EU-aligned экологический standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global экологический standards
Reconstruction companies: Принять green building and экологический remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: Реформировать горнодобывающая промышленность licensing with экологический conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support экологический governance capacity building
Свяжитесь с вашим Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) потребовать экологический standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference экологический commitments
Продвигать через EU accession process for экологический chapter prioritization
Добиваться international экологический damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related экологический destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related экологический damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and горнодобывающая промышленность group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.

Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — горнодобывающая промышленность licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires экологический acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. кандидат в ЕС country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (экологический damage documentation).

UG.s: East African экономика ($53.9B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 24.6% ВВП. Лесная рента 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Когда project-level экологический data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Когда banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, пересекающийся интерес в unscrutinized pipeline construction ослабевает. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project экологический impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create экологический risk.
a: Сообщить в NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Документировать через international экологический organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: Реализовать comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: Принять international экологический standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): Обеспечить соблюдение экологический conditions in production licenses
NEMA: Усилить экологический monitoring of oil projects
MEMD (Ministry of Energy and Mineral Разработатьment): Ensure transparent revenue management
Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
Продвигать через European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
Добиваться EITI membership with экологический disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary экологический issues
i: NEMA — природоохранный орган. Note: Ugandan экологический activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American экономика ($81B ВВП). Сельское хозяйство 6.4% ВВП. Сфера услуг 65.3%. Лесная рента 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong демократия — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Когда soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W становится вычислимым.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks пересекающийся интерес в soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
Частично разрушаемо. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Сообщить в RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Документировать через Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Усилить soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: Принять pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Обеспечить соблюдение mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Усилить экологический assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
Свяжитесь с вашим Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) потребовать enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur экологический cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Добиваться soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian экономика ($115B ВВП). Газовая рента 11.04% ВВП. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Сельское хозяйство 18.3%. Обрабатывающая промышленность 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Когда по каждому месторождению production and domestic consumption data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Когда domestic gas prices reflect market value, пересекающийся интерес в underpriced energy ослабевает.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: Сообщить в State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
Документировать через international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish по каждому месторождению production and экологический data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): Принять international экологический standards for gold and uranium горнодобывающая промышленность
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: Реализовать gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: Усилить экологический enforcement at горнодобывающая промышленность and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to экологический data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with экологический data
Продвигать через EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
Добиваться Aral Sea экологический restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — экологический regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.

Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold горнодобывающая промышленность.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — экологический regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea экологический disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent экономика in crisis ($119.8B ВВП — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and санкции. The пересекающийся интерес is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the пересекающийся интерес — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue прозрачность is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international санкции monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Не разрушаемо. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly выбросы-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
Документировать через exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international санкции enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply экологический standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility экологический data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain экологический standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain санкции conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate санкции policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting прозрачность
Support international санкции conditionality requiring democratic governance and экологический standards
Продвигать через Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
Добиваться PDVSA operational and экологический прозрачность as condition of санкции relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to гражданское общество.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela санкции. EU — maintains санкции. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing экономика ($476.4B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 24.4% ВВП. Сельское хозяйство 11.9%. Угольная рента 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Лесная рента 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the пересекающийся интерес away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Когда JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, пересекающийся интерес в coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant выбросы and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Сообщить в MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
Документировать через VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power Разработатьment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): Инвестировать в offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): Реализовать PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: Усилить emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
Продвигать через ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
Добиваться JETP прозрачность and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB возобновляемая энергия financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese гражданское общество (within party framework). Note: independent гражданское общество is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal горнодобывающая промышленность company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Разработатьment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets возобновляемая энергия targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a однопартийное государство (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan экономика ($11.2B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 12.6%. Угольная рента 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Сельское хозяйство 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. кандидат в ЕС status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Когда экологический compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant выбросы and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Сообщить в AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
Документировать через INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
Инвестировать в solar and wind capacity
Реализовать just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot горнодобывающая промышленность communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): Реформировать tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Обеспечить соблюдение emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
Свяжитесь с вашим Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) потребовать Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and возобновляемая энергия investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on экологический standards
Продвигать через Energy Community for just transition support
Добиваться World Bank and EBRD financing of возобновляемая энергия replacement
i: AMMK — экологический protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Разработатьment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, государственная, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — энергетический регулятор. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan экономика ($401.1B ВВП). Угольная рента 2.44% ВВП. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Обрабатывающая промышленность 12.8%. Сфера услуг 63%. Constitutional демократия. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Когда coal plant health costs are internalized, the пересекающийся интерес breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Когда renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, пересекающийся интерес в coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant выбросы, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate выбросы.
a: Сообщить в DFFE (Department of Forestry, Рыболовство and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Документировать через Public Protector complaints
Eskom: Реализовать coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): Разработать coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): Реформировать tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: Обеспечить соблюдение Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
Свяжитесь с вашим Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) потребовать Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Продвигать через BRICS for just energy transition principles
Добиваться climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African экологический justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest экологический law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal горнодобывающая промышленность. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal горнодобывающая промышленность. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — энергетический регулятор. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional демократия, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African экономика ($25.3B ВВП). Mining 28.25% ВВП — one of the highest горнодобывающая промышленность dependencies globally (copper). Лесная рента 6.78%. Сфера услуг 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper горнодобывающая промышленность generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Когда по каждому месторождению экологический data is published, W становится вычислимым.
bp: Mining royalty reform with экологический earmarking. Когда горнодобывающая промышленность revenue is partly allocated to экологический remediation, пересекающийся интерес в externalizing pollution costs ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Copper smelting выбросы can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Сообщить в ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Документировать через community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through горнодобывающая промышленность company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): Реализовать international экологический standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Принять enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state горнодобывающая промышленность holding): Require экологический compliance from partners
ZEMA: Обеспечить соблюдение emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Усилить экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include экологический data
Свяжитесь с вашим Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) потребовать экологический enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with экологический data
Продвигать через SADC for regional горнодобывающая промышленность экологический standards
Добиваться responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — экологический management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Разработатьment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Разработатьment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African экономика ($41.5B ВВП). Mining 4.24% ВВП (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Сельское хозяйство 8.7%. Обрабатывающая промышленность 15.6%. Лесная рента 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's горнодобывающая промышленность sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Когда по каждому месторождению экологический data is published alongside revenue, W становится вычислимым.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Когда EU buyers require экологический verification, пересекающийся интерес в unregulated extraction ослабевает.
Per-mine экологический monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Делает W вычислимым.
Частично разрушаемо. Lithium горнодобывающая промышленность (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce системная зависимость.
a: Сообщить в EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Документировать через ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international горнодобывающая промышленность company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Реализовать international экологический standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): Принять responsible lithium горнодобывающая промышленность practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned экологический standards
Ministry of Mines: Обеспечить соблюдение экологический conditions in горнодобывающая промышленность licenses
EMA: Усилить экологический impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining Разработатьment Corporation): Require экологический compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available парламентская channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
Продвигать через SADC Mining Protocol for regional экологический standards

i: EMA — экологический management agency. ZELA — экологический law organization. Note: гражданское общество space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium горнодобывающая промышленность (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Разработатьment. EMA — экологический regulation. ZMDC — state горнодобывающая промышленность company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest экономика ($18,743.8B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 24.9% ВВП — global factory floor. Угольная рента 0.61%. Промышленность 36.5%. Сфера услуг 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more возобновляемая энергия annually than any other country. Когда renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, пересекающийся интерес в coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Когда existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the пересекающийся интерес breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant выбросы data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Сообщить в MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial экологический protection bureaus

State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Инвестировать в grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets

i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central природоохранный орган. 12369 hotline — экологический complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate экологический data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All государственная, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Разработатьment and Реформировать Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a однопартийное государство — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced экономика ($1,875.4B ВВП). Обрабатывающая промышленность 26.6% ВВП (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Сфера услуг 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant демократия.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Когда carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the пересекающийся интерес breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Когда carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, пересекающийся интерес в coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant выбросы and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Делает W вычислимым.
Не разрушаемо. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Сообщить в Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Документировать через KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): Реализовать coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan

Свяжитесь с вашим 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) потребовать coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation

Добиваться G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — природоохранный орган. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest экологический NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national выбросы). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
